t_ch: 唷，{NICKNAME}，最近过得怎么样？
t_en: Hey, {NICKNAME}. How's it going?

t_ch: 停——不用回答，我不关心，只是随便找个开场白。
t_en: Stop... I don't need the answer, I don't care for it. It's just something random I say to begin a conversation.

t_ch: 最近，我们又给模拟宇宙加了点新东西，一个全新的<color=#dbc291ff>「扩展装置」</color>。
t_en: We've added something — a new <color=#dbc291ff>expansion module</color> — into the Simulated Universe again recently.

t_ch: 但斯蒂芬•劳艾德觉得这次是个大工程，坚持要单开一个项目分支，叫《模拟宇宙：寰宇蝗灾》。
t_en: But Stephen sees this as a major project and insists on creating a separate branch for it called Simulated Universe: Swarm Disaster.

t_ch: 他以为在玩游戏呢。
t_en: He thinks he's playing a video game.

t_ch: 更新了什么？
t_en: What's new?

t_ch: 长话短说，一个骰子。
t_en: In short, a die.

t_ch: 听不懂？跑一遍就懂了。
t_en: Confused? Go through it yourself, and you'll get it.

t_ch: 寰宇蝗灾？
t_en: Swarm Disaster?

t_ch: 模拟宇宙里的冗余数据太多了。你跑了那么远，只碰到过几次星神，可怜巴巴，还没什么机会搭话！
t_en: There's too much redundant data in the Simulated Universe. You went so far, yet you've only met the Aeons a couple of times. You worked so hard but didn't even get many chances to speak with them!

t_ch: 所以我打算把宇宙时间固定在某个历史片段里，缩小范围，对研究某一位星神更有帮助。不过我也不知道把你丢进哪段琥珀纪里好——
t_en: So, I plan to lock the cosmic time within a specific historical segment, narrowing down the scope to study a particular Aeon more effectively. However, I'm not sure which Amber Era to throw you into...

t_ch: 但阮•梅有些自己的想法。她打定主意，锚定了<color=#dbc291ff>「虫皇」塔伊兹育罗斯</color>陨落前的那段时空。
t_en: Ruan Mei has her own idea. She's made up her mind to anchor the cosmic time to the period before the fall of <color=#dbc291ff>Tayzzyronth the Imperator Insectorum</color>.

t_ch: 我喜欢玩游戏。
t_en: I like playing video games.

t_ch: 行啊。我不喜欢。
t_en: Good for you. I don't.

t_ch: 总之，麻烦你进去看看咯。
t_en: Anyway, please go ahead and take a look.

t_ch: 咦，等等——这什么鬼？
t_en: Huh, hang on, what in the stars is this?

t_ch: 「什么玩意？」黑塔拦住了你，她把模拟宇宙暂停，皱了皱鼻子，「斯蒂芬•劳艾德向我保证——要神圣、庄重地觐见星神，他怎么敢把『觐见装置』做成这样？」
t_en: "What's the!?" Herta stops you and pauses the Simulated Universe. Her nose scrunches in annoyance as she complains, "Stephen Lloyd promised me that the audience with the Aeons would be done in a sacred and solemn way. Why is the Communing Device done like this?"

t_ch: 倒是挺有趣的…
t_en: It's quite interesting...

t_ch: 倒是挺个性的…
t_en: It's quite unique...

t_ch: 「见鬼，难道非要我亲自检查一遍所有的东西？阮•梅在干嘛？」黑塔一脸不悦，「这群家伙把模拟宇宙当成什么了？…算了，我也不在乎。你陪它玩吧。」
t_en: "As if! Do I really have to check every single detail myself? What is Ruan Mei doing?" Looking displeased, Herta continues, "What do they think they are doing with the Simulated Universe? Whatever, I don't care anymore. Do whatever."

t_ch: 「按原本的设计，『觐见之骰』是个类似供奉神龛的容器，承载着各条命途上行者的过往、经历，和因此流溢的能量！」黑塔皱了皱鼻子，「原本应该是这样的。」
t_en: "Based on the original design, the Audience Dice is a vessel similar to a shrine that carries the past and experiences of various Pathstriders, and the energy that flows due to it." Herta's nose twitches as she adds, "Originally, anyway."

t_ch: 「就这样吧，反正事情都发生了。祝你和『觐见装置』相处愉快，不愉快也无所谓。我非得找斯蒂芬那小子算账不可。」
t_en: "I'll let it be since it has happened. I wish you have a great time with the Communing Device. Or not, it doesn't matter. I have a score to settle with that kid Stephen."

t_ch: 「我特别好奇一件事：模拟宇宙的引导为什么按在我头上？变成我的职责了？」黑塔讥笑着，好像想到了点法子，「我得把阮•梅和螺丝咕姆接进来，让他们做点实事，{NICKNAME}，你要见大人物了。」
t_en: "I'm really puzzled as to why I'm in charge of the tutorial on the Simulated Universe. When did it become my responsibility?" Sneering, Herta seems to have come up with a brilliant idea. "I must bring Ruan Mei and Screwllum here and let them do some real work. {NICKNAME}, you're about to meet some big shots soon."

t_ch: 「我可以加入，但我不认为斯蒂芬的意见对研究星神有什么帮助。」一个冷漠的、崭新的声音出现了，她言简意赅。
t_en: "I can join, but I don't think Stephen's opinion is helpful to the study of Aeons." An indifferent voice emerges. She makes her statement clear and concise.

t_ch: 这是谁？
t_en: Who's this?

t_ch: 「我还没介绍呢，你怎么就进来了？」黑塔摊手，「天才俱乐部#81 阮•梅，生物领域的天才。要我引用下公司的评价吗？『阮•梅拥有超人的知觉和思想整合能力，能轻易捕捉现实的微观细节，并于脑内将之统合成信息洪流，并以此进行推演思考。她为人十分低调…』，低调？笑死我啦。」
t_en: "Why did you come in so soon? I haven't introduced you yet." Herta shrugs, "Genius Society #81, Ruan Mei, a genius in the field of biology. Should I quote the evaluation from the IPC? 'Ruan Mei possesses extraordinary perception and cognitive integration abilities, easily capturing microscopic details of reality and synthesizing them into a torrent of information within her mind, which she uses for deductive thinking. She's very low-key...' Low-key? That's hilarious!"

t_ch: 阮•梅突然出现了！
t_en: A wild Ruan Mei has appeared!

t_ch: 「你什么时候见过她？」黑塔皱了下眉头，但没有深究，「天才俱乐部#81 阮•梅，生物领域的天才。要我引用下公司的评价吗？『阮•梅拥有超人的知觉和思想整合能力，能轻易捕捉现实的微观细节，并于脑内将之统合成信息洪流，并以此进行推演思考。她为人十分低调…』，低调？笑死我啦。」
t_en: "Have you met her before?" Herta frowns but does not probe. "Genius Society #81, Ruan Mei, a genius in the field of biology. Should I quote the evaluation from the IPC? 'Ruan Mei possesses extraordinary perception and cognitive integration abilities, easily capturing microscopic details of reality and synthesizing them into a torrent of information within her mind, which she uses for deductive thinking. She's very low-key...' Low-key? That's hilarious!"

t_ch: 谁给你们设计的电子形象？
t_en: Who designed your avatar?

t_ch: 「当然是我，多可爱。至于你…我还没介绍呢，你怎么就进来了？」黑塔摊手，「天才俱乐部#81 阮•梅，生物领域的天才。要我引用下公司的评价吗？『阮•梅拥有超人的知觉和思想整合能力，能轻易捕捉现实的微观细节，并于脑内将之统合成信息洪流，并以此进行推演思考。她为人十分低调…』，低调？笑死我啦。」
t_en: "It was me, of course. Aren't they cute? As for you... Why did you come in so soon? I haven't introduced you yet." Herta shrugs and continues, "Genius Society #81, Ruan Mei, a genius in the field of biology. Should I quote the evaluation from the IPC? 'Ruan Mei possesses extraordinary perception and cognitive integration abilities, easily capturing microscopic details of reality and synthesizing them into a torrent of information within her mind, which she uses for deductive thinking. She's very low-key...' Low-key? That's hilarious!"

t_ch: 「话说回来，斯蒂芬做东西就这样。我们想研究星神，他可未必。」黑塔重新看向你，「好了，该解释的都说完了，后面你自己加油吧。在这个扩展装置里，时间流速是锁定的，所以，你会看到模拟宇宙被切成了几个位面。」
t_en: "But then again, it's typical of Stephen to do things like that. We want to study the Aeons, but I'm not sure about him." Herta looks back at you and continues, "Well, I've explained everything I can. You have to count on yourself after this. In this expansion module, the flow of time is locked, so you'll see the Simulated Universe divided into several planes."

t_ch: 感觉如何。
t_en: How do you feel?

t_ch: 挺有意思。
t_en: This is pretty interesting.

t_ch: 变化不大。
t_en: I don't feel anything different.

t_ch: 等螺丝咕姆聚拢完位面数据，我就把之前的星神资料接进来。
t_en: After Screwllum has finished gathering the planar data, I'll add in the previous Aeons' information.

t_ch: 之后你就可以正式探索「寰宇蝗灾」了。
t_en: Then, you can start exploring the Swarm Disaster.

t_ch: 「上次没怎么说明，现在是时候和你解释『位面』是什么了。」黑塔嗤嗤地笑着，「我刚去做了点别的——如你所见，我邀请伟大的机械贵族——螺丝咕姆加入这场对话。」
t_en: "I didn't tell you about the planes last time, so let's do that now." Herta snickers, "I was working on something else just now. As you can see, I've invited Screwllum, the great mechanical aristocrat, to this chat."

t_ch: 「设问：若『寰宇蝗灾』此时尚在起点，是否可证『繁育』星神的诞育时分为第一位面？」一个机械的声音突然出现，那声音里带有君主般的高贵风范，「你好，很高兴见到你，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。」
t_en: "If the Swarm Disaster is currently in its initial stage, can we infer that the birth of the Aeon of Propagation is the first plane?" A mechanical voice with elegance worthy of a king suddenly chimes in. "Greetings. It's a pleasure to see you here, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}."

t_ch: 很荣幸见到你。
t_en: It's an honor to meet you.

t_ch: 「听见你这么说，我很高兴。」螺丝咕姆说，「你的到来像画面中点缀上一只缺少的蝴蝶，完整的图景令模拟宇宙变得栩栩如生。我十分期待与你共同前进的旅程。」
t_en: "I'm glad to hear that." Screwllum says, "Your presence is akin to a butterfly that completes the scenery that brings the entire Simulated Universe alive. I look forward to the journey ahead with you."

t_ch: 我十分想念你。
t_en: I miss you a lot.

t_ch: 「我十分荣幸。」螺丝咕姆说，「你的到来像画面中点缀上一只缺少的蝴蝶，完整的图景令模拟宇宙变得栩栩如生。我十分期待与你共同前进的旅程。」
t_en: "It's my honor." Screwllum says, "Your presence is akin to a butterfly that completes the scenery that brings the entire Simulated Universe alive. I look forward to the journey ahead with you."

t_ch: 「螺丝咕姆也会关注这趟研究！毕竟『寰宇蝗灾』的过程也和无机生命息息相关。」黑塔又说道，「如你所见：这『三个位面』分别对应三个不同的历史时期——而你现在所在的第一个时空里，『虫潮』才刚刚振翅。」
t_en: "Screwllum will follow this study closely too! After all, the process of the Swarm Disaster is also closely related to inorganic beings." Herta adds, "As you can see, the three planes correspond to three different historical periods. You're now in the first plane, and that is when the Swarm has just started."

t_ch: 「所以…现在你可能听不见什么动静。等到下个位面，『虫潮』开始蔓延时…{NICKNAME}，自求多福啦。」黑塔开始饶有兴致，「不过没关系，我们会看着的。」
t_en: "So... there's not much action at the moment. When The Swarm starts spreading in the next plane... {NICKNAME}, you'll have to pray for luck to be on your side." With an amused expression, Herta says, "Don't worry. We'll watch over you."

t_ch: 原来这就是『寰宇蝗灾』！你站在天幕下，看见四周一片哀鸿遍野：你身旁的田野、公路上，声势浩瀚的异虫在繁殖、破茧，它们吞噬所有的粮食与物种，直到所有行进的道路都被各类虫嗣淹没……
t_en: So, this is the Swarm Disaster! Standing under the sky, you find your surroundings in a state of desolation. A massive swarm of mutated insects is reproducing and breaking free from their cocoons in the fields and roads around you. They devour all crops and animals until all the paths are flooded by their kinds...

t_ch: 你继续向前走。你走进一个巨型装置，面前有一个展台：屏幕里展示着一些科技更为发达的星系，部分『虫群』在那里已成为巨型的战争兵器。许多先锋部队以纤细甲壳节肢撑起庞大身躯，巨型的蠕虫站在它们身后作为后卫——它们的圆形巨口中是闪烁金属光芒的利齿。
t_en: You move ahead and enter a huge device. There is a platform in front of you, where a screen is showing some of the more advanced stellar systems. Some Swarms have evolved into large weapons of war there. Many vanguard units support their massive bodies with slender, armored limbs, while giant worms stand behind them as defenders. Inside the worms' round, gaping mouths are sharp teeth that give off a metallic glint.

t_ch: 你打了个寒颤。这些虫族除践行本能外并无意识。你不禁怀疑起这种科技改造来源于何处…
t_en: You shudder. These insects only act according to their instincts and have no awareness. You can't help wondering about the source of this technological modification...

t_ch: 「{NICKNAME}，刚刚提醒过你了，第二位面的虫子是最多的。」黑塔的声音出现，她把你的思绪拉回，「赶紧走，当心被虫潮困住了，难以脱身。你还得跑完三个位面呢。」
t_en: "{NICKNAME}, I reminded you earlier that the second plane had the most insects." Herta's voice pulls your mind back to reality. "Go now. Be careful not to be caught by the Swarm and get stuck here. Don't forget you have to visit all three planes."

t_ch: 你的思绪被拉回…是时候继续硬着头皮前进了。
t_en: You snap back to reality... It's time to brace yourself and move on.

t_ch: 「你已经到第三位面了？这么快吗，简直不可思议。我们竟然会用这么快的速度遍历一次历史上的寰宇蝗灾。」黑塔看了看闪亮的天空。
t_en: "You've reached the third plane already? This is surprisingly fast. We're traversing the entire historical Swarm Disaster at such a rapid speed." Herta glances at the glimmering sky.

t_ch: 「推敲和规划物种发展，耐心培育，浇灌，直到它在千丝万缕中成型，培育宇宙的原理如此。」阮•梅说，「看上去成功了。虫潮迅速蔓延宇宙，接着褪去，很符合塔伊兹育罗斯由盛而陨的历程。」
t_en: "Planning the development of species and nurturing them patiently until they begin to take form through a complex process — that's how a universe is created." Ruan Mei comments, "It seems like we've succeeded. The Swarm quickly spreads all over the universe, then recedes. This is in line with the rise and fall of Tayzzyronth."

t_ch: 「褪去，对，塔伊兹育罗斯陨落后，虫潮就从宇宙各地消褪了！」黑塔听到关键词，音调高了起来，「听着，我们得弄明白：<color=#dbc291ff>这场『寰宇蝗灾』是怎么回事？</color>塔伊兹育罗斯似乎是在列神之战中陨落了，毕竟，除了祂们谁又能杀死星神？但研究没有『似乎』。我们得把它彻底搞明白。」
t_en: "Recedes... Indeed, the Swarm did recede across the universe following the fall of Tayzzyronth!" The excitement in Herta's voice is unmistakable upon hearing the keyword. "Listen, we need to figure out <color=#dbc291ff>why this Swarm Disaster happened.</color> It appears that Tayzzyronth was killed in a battle among Aeons. After all, who else could have killed an Aeon? However, there is no 'appears to be' in scientific research. We need to get a thorough understanding."

t_ch: 这是…好熟悉的地方…
t_en: This is... a very familiar place...

t_ch: 「我们好像有进展了，别晕头转向。」黑塔的气声传来，她难得正经，似乎对接下来要发生的事带有一丝兴奋，「你能不能给自己弹个脑瓜清醒下？仔细看——我们推演出塔伊兹育罗斯了。」
t_en: "We seem to be making progress. Don't get overwhelmed." Herta's voice comes through. Unlike her usual self, she speaks seriously and seems excited about what is going to unfold. "Can you hit yourself on your head and focus? Take a closer look - we've derived Tayzzyronth."

t_ch: 塔伊兹育罗斯…？一切来得太快，你还未做好准备。你抬起头，倏忽间天空划过一丝亮光……
t_en: Tayzzyronth? Everything happens so fast that you aren't ready for the change. You look up, and a beam of light flashes across the sky all of a sudden...

t_ch: 异妙的啼哭突然出现，你确信那是婴虫对空气的第一声吮吸。连带赤蝶嗜吸百合的音节，一些不同味道的唾液滴落…它有橙味、血液或是热带水果的不同气息，让你误以为自己身处汽水的海洋中。
t_en: A peculiar cry suddenly comes from somewhere, and you are certain it is the first suckling sound of an infant insect to the air. Along with it comes the melodic tone of red butterflies sucking honey from lilies. The saliva of different scents such as the scents of orange, blood, and tropical fruits is dripping, making you feel as though you were immersed in an ocean of soda.

t_ch: 漫天琳琅作响的翅粉令你产生轻微的幻觉。你发现祂正被无数摇摇欲坠的黄蝴蝶、蚁虫、陨窠虫与不同大小的蛰虫簇拥着。祂在这种幻象的簇拥中不停飞升上天空…祂的血液看上去是彩色的。只是你并无从得知祂为何而流血……
t_en: You have a mild hallucination due to the ringing and chiming dust on butterfly wings that covers the sky. You find the Aeon surrounded by countless yellow butterflies, ants, meteor bugs, and hibernating insects of different sizes that are on the verge of falling. Amidst the illusion, THEY begin a continuous ascent to the sky... THEIR blood appears colorful, but you have no idea why THEY are bleeding...

t_ch: 惊谲的意象在你面前铺展开来：在这个时刻，祂的身躯颤抖而胆小地蜷缩起来，无数新的虫族纲目却在这时出现：它们交换信息素，如同花朵交换不同颜色的花瓣，接着就诞育完全不同的*新物种*。
t_en: A mind-blowing phenomenon unravels before you. The Aeon's trembling body curls up timidly, as countless new insect species emerge at the same time. They exchange pheromones, just like how flowers exchange for petals of different colors. Then, an entirely new species is born.

t_ch: 「不出意料，就该在这。『繁育』命途从古至今，自宇宙诞生以来最盛的时期——珍惜吧，在祂陨落后，这一切都不会再来了。」黑塔依旧轻声。
t_en: "As expected, it's here. This is the most prosperous period of the Path of Propagation since the creation of the universe. Cherish it, as these will be gone for good after the Aeon falls." Herta speaks softly.

t_ch: 「{NICKNAME}，设想一下，假设我们现在站在『虫潮』振翅、消褪、又再现，如此这般周而复始的循环之中，感觉如何？」黑塔突然笑了，「一次又一次地旁观宇宙历程，不错啊。」
t_en: "{NICKNAME}, how would you feel if we stood observer to the repeating cycle where the Swarm is born, recedes, and resurges?" Herta suddenly chuckles, "It'd be quite a nice experience to watch the journey of the universe again and again."

t_ch: 看起来不用我再教什么了。我开启了<color=#dbc291ff>觐见之间</color>，一个能帮你更快觐见星神的模块。
t_en: Seems like there's nothing else I need to teach you. I've activated the <color=#dbc291ff>Audience Chamber</color>, a module that can help you have an audience with the Aeons quicker.

t_ch: 你可以踏着各个命途上行者留下的足迹，让自己更接近对应的星神。
t_en: You can follow the footsteps of the Pathstriders to get closer to a particular Aeon.

t_ch: 当然，也是斯蒂芬的点子——他总是把问题想的很简单，算了，能帮上忙就行。
t_en: No doubt, that's another of Stephen's ideas. He always underestimates the trickiness of an issue. Ah well, I guess as long as his ideas work.

t_ch: 螺丝咕姆刚提醒我，「宇宙数据封装已近上限，应该及时将它存储起来。」
t_en: Screwllum just reminded me, "Universe data encapsulation is about to reach capacity. Timely storage is highly recommended."

t_ch: 看来一次测试只能容纳这么多数据了。想再继续，就得先把之前的储存清空。
t_en: Looks like this is the limit for data capacity in one test. We'll have to clear the previous data if we want to continue.

t_ch: 但我觉得也够了——最后做个总结，给这次的选题收个尾吧。
t_en: But I think this is enough. Let's make a final summary and wrap up this topic.

t_ch: 「{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，我十分惋惜与你的相聚要暂时告一段落。」螺丝咕姆深深地鞠了一躬，「天才俱乐部感谢你对模拟宇宙的付出。」
t_en: "{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, it is with great regret that our meeting has come to an end." Screwllum bows deeply, "The Genius Society thanks you for your contributions to the Simulated Universe."

t_ch: 不用谢。
t_en: Don't sweat it.

t_ch: 我们的相处就要结束了吗？
t_en: So our time has come to an end?

t_ch: 「请别担心，仅是暂时而已。」螺丝咕姆说，「下次测试时，我们仍会再见。」
t_en: "Don't worry. It is just temporary." Screwllum says. "We will meet again in the next test."

t_ch: 「我们得挑最重要的数据保存。」阮•梅说，「譬如星神。」
t_en: "We have to select the most important data to store." Ruan Mei says, "Like the Aeons."

t_ch: 「是啊是啊。{NICKNAME}，干得不错，模拟宇宙都给你玩宕机了。」黑塔说，「我让螺丝咕姆把这些行迹重新梳理了一遍——就当是最后的重温。」
t_en: "That's right. Well done, {NICKNAME} — you've managed to crash the Simulated Universe." Herta says, "I had Screwllum re-organize these traces. We'll just take it as a final review."

t_ch: 我准备好了。
t_en: Ready.

t_ch: 「反应挺快。」黑塔讥笑着，「{NICKNAME}，经过我们的努力，这场涉及众多星神与派系的寰宇蝗灾——其始末初见轮廓。但同时，有<color=#dbc291ff>三个巨大的疑点</color>也随之浮现，你发现了没有？」
t_en: "That was a quick." Herta remarks snidely. "{NICKNAME}, With our efforts, we now have a rough idea of this Swarm Disaster involving multiple Aeons and factions. But, at the same time, there are <color=#dbc291ff>three major points of suspicion</color> that have surfaced. Have you noticed them?"

t_ch: 啊？我还没有准备好！
t_en: Eh? I'm not ready yet!

t_ch: 「磨磨蹭蹭的。」黑塔讥笑着，「{NICKNAME}，经过我们的努力，这场涉及众多星神与派系的寰宇蝗灾，其始末初见轮廓。但同时，有<color=#dbc291ff>三个巨大的疑点</color>也随之浮现，你发现了没有？」
t_en: "Slowpoke." Herta mocks you. "{NICKNAME}, with our efforts, we now have a rough idea of this Swarm Disaster involving multiple Aeons and factions. But, at the same time, there are <color=#dbc291ff>three major points of suspicion</color> that have surfaced. Have you noticed them?"

t_ch: 「在古琥珀纪中的某个时刻，噢！那真是一个不起眼的时刻。捕食者、被捕食者，猎手、猎物，被捉弄者与捉弄者…千星寰宇、物种百态、战争兵器与那罄竹难书的罪，全都在命运偶然的交合处爆发！——凡人压根无从得知，在那样万千族群诞育的瞬间，塔伊兹育罗斯于孤独与仇恨中飞升成神。」
t_en: "At some point in the ancient Amber Era, oof! It was an absolutely uneventful time. Predators and prey, the hunters and hunted, the tricked and the tricksters... myriads of stars and organisms, weapons of war and countless sins, all came together at once and exploded at a fortuitous point in fate! Mortals had no way of knowing that Tayzzyronth ascended as a god in its loneliness and hatred in that split moment when endless species were born."

t_ch: 「<color=#dbc291ff>第一个疑点！</color>还记得吗？蠹星系的前史是一片空白。那本是个与文明一词无缘的世界，却突然成为众多命途的交汇点。<color=#dbc291ff>塔伊兹育罗斯的诞育或是偶然，但蠹星系的灭绝却不自然！</color>」黑塔洋洋得意地开始补充，「是谁引发了这场灾难——『贪饕』？『秩序』？『欢愉』？还是在众多琐碎细节中一闪而过的『终末』？至少现在我们不得而知。」
t_en: "<color=#dbc291ff>The first point of suspicion!</color> Do you remember? There was nothing regarding the history of the Lepismat system. It was supposed to be a world that was the farthest thing from civilization, and yet it suddenly became a hub for myriads of Paths to intersect. <color=#dbc291ff>Tayzzyronth's birth may have been coincidence, but the Lepismat system's destruction most certainly wasn't a natural occurrence!</color>" Herta smugly adds, "Who caused this disaster? The Voracity? The Order? The Elation? Or was it the Finality that flashes across the countless trivialities and details? We don't know yet, for now."

t_ch: 「走吧，我们到第二位面再继续咯。」黑塔摊了摊手，讥笑着消失了。
t_en: "Go on. We'll continue at the Second Plane." Herta spreads out her hands and vanishes with a sneer.

t_ch: 「好啰，{NICKNAME}，我们该继续了…说到哪里了？噢！蔓延的虫潮吞噬宇宙，甚至威胁到了『贪饕』…接着，奥博洛斯与塔伊兹育罗斯的对抗持续了数个琥珀纪！」
t_en: "Alright, {NICKNAME}, let's keep going... Where were we? Ah! The creeping Swarm devoured the cosmos, and even threatened the Voracity... Then, the confrontation between Oroboros and Tayzzyronth lasted for several Amber Eras!"

t_ch: 「祂的火焰绚烂无比；祂的巨口吞噬万物。噢，无数信徒、巨兽、生命，从未得知自己的存在因祂们的斗争而被扼杀——如此可怜弱小，结局早已注定，可他们还得认真过完这一生！」
t_en: "THEIR flames were magnificent beyond compare, THEIR giant maw devoured all existences. Oh, innumerable believers, giant beasts, lifeforms, that never knew their existences were ended by Aeons' battle. How weak and pitiful, for the outcome was already ordained, but they still had to live out their lives in earnest!"

t_ch: 「有机生物的食欲，本质为何物？」螺丝咕姆问道，「我仅与虚空鲸、蝴蝶相伴，未曾研究过星神的生命形态。祂的『吞噬』成谜。」
t_en: "The appetite of organic creatures... what is its nature?" Screwllum inquires, "I have only been in the company of void song whales and butterflies, and have never researched the lifeform of Aeons. THEIR devouring is a mystery."

t_ch: 是『肚子饿了就要吃』。
t_en: It is "to eat when one is hungry."

t_ch: 是『人之大欲』。
t_en: It is "Man's greatest desire."

t_ch: 「啧…星神生命的谜团！这不就是阮•梅最在乎的东西吗？要我说，就是肚子饿得叮呤哐啷。用螺丝星的话来说…你们以什么为食来着？反正就是螺丝胃里叽里咕噜。」黑塔清了清嗓子，「我们继续，我还没说完呢。」
t_en: "Tsk... a grand mystery of the Aeons' lives! Isn't this what Ruan Mei cares about most? In my language, it's when your stomach's going 'Grrr.' In Screwllum... what exactly do you guys eat? Anyway, it's when a Screwllum tummy goes 'Whrrr.'" Herta clears her throat, "Let us continue. I'm not done talking."

t_ch: 「在此之后，终于——『秩序』太一示现，祂的面容神圣，声音此般空濛。」
t_en: "After that, at last, the Order's Ena made THEIR appearance. THEIR visage was divine, THEIR voice sublime."

t_ch: 「同时，『秩序』与『存护』的命途产生了交汇——二者对生命的庇护光辉交集到了一起。」
t_en: "At the same time, Order and Preservation's Paths crossed — their lights that blessed life intertwined."

t_ch: 「就是这里。」黑塔暂停了，「<color=#dbc291ff>第二个疑点来了——奥博洛斯和太一在这个故事中途消失了！</color>完全、彻底的了无音讯，仿佛在表面的舞台之下，有另一个故事在暗中推进…也可能是我们的推演漏了些什么，总之我十分怀疑。好吧，那么…接着呢？接下来气氛如何到达高潮，几位神如何在同一琥珀纪加入列神的战局？{NICKNAME}，我们到第三位面再继续啰。」
t_en: "Right here." Herta pauses," <color=#dbc291ff>The second point of suspicion: Oroboros and Ena vanished in the middle of this tale!</color> Completely, silently, as if there was another story progressing along in the shadows underneath the main stage... Or perhaps we left something out in our simulation. In any case, highly suspicious. Okay, then... What happened next? How does the story reach its climax? How did these gods join the clash of the gods in the same Amber Era? {NICKNAME}, we shall continue on the third plane."

t_ch: 「继续吧。」阮•梅说，「一切终有尽头。」
t_en: "Continue." Ruan Mei says, "Everything must have an end."

t_ch: 继续结束一切吧。
t_en: Finish it up.

t_ch: 「给我点时间，我开始啰——『欢愉』的阿哈！这家伙可玩了不少把戏！反正，祂把气氛炒热了！但祂真的在乎这些吗？」
t_en: "Give me a moment, I'm going to start! Aha of the Elation! This one certainly went ham on THEIR antics! Anyway, THEY were the one who got everyone riled up! But did THEY truly care about any of this?"

t_ch: 「祂在乎？祂不在乎？谁知道呢？唉，可怜贡多拉上那些几代人的努力，他们真以为自己能帮到诸神…我只看到凡人行为皆是徒劳！但人们徒劳无功，却乐在其中。这算什么呀？」
t_en: "THEY did? THEY didn't? Who knows? Alas, a pity on the efforts of those generations of people on the gondola. They thought they could help the Gods... All I see is the futility of mortal acts! Then again, people work in vain, yet revel in their efforts. What of it, then?"

t_ch: 「阿哈老是这样，下次我们给祂设一个『威胁值』，把模拟阿哈的威胁降低好了，别让祂老这么吓人。嗯…继续吧。」
t_en: "Aha's always been this way. We should assign a 'threat meter' for THEM next time to reduce the simulated Aha's hostility. That'll stop THEM from frightening everyone all the time. Hmm... let's move on."

t_ch: （无视阿哈。）
t_en: (Ignore Aha.)

t_ch: 「『同谐』希佩的光辉如霓虹般令人崇尚，世人皆向往得到祂的庇佑。祂宣扬和谐一致的喜乐，将所有意志归于一尊。家族的颂歌传播于世间各个角落，祂对万物意志理解、支持与配合的包容难以想象，或许在此之上祂已走向凡人难以想象的维度。无限扩张的『同谐』着实令人憧憬，宇宙群星如碎钻环绕、装饰祂的身躯，文明在祂手中变成一抹捏住的彩虹。」
t_en: "The revered light of Xipe the Harmony shone like a rainbow, and the masses clamored in desire of THEIR blessing. THEY proclaimed harmonious joy, and united all wills as one. The Family's songs spread to all corners of the world, and THEIR understanding, support and synergy for the will of all creatures was beyond imagination. Or perhaps, THEY were already above all else on this front, ascending to a plane beyond mortal minds. The ever-expanding Harmony was truly desirous. Cosmic stars encircled THEM like crushed diamonds, adorning THEIR body, and civilization became a rainbow to be molded in THEIR palm."

t_ch: 「是的，『同谐』的光辉接着显露了。」阮•梅的声音冷不丁地响起，「有趣的是，在『欢愉』、『同谐』的迹象之中，『均衡』的现象似乎一直存在。我们未推演出祂，但祂贯穿始终，在天平发生偏移时产生微妙痕迹，祂的决定无法被质疑。」
t_en: "Yes. The Harmony's radiance then reveals itself," Ruan Mei's voice suddenly rings out. "Interesting enough, the phenomenon of Equilibrium appears to have always been present amidst signs of Elation and Harmony. We did not manage to deduce the Equilibrium, but THEY were present throughout everything, creating subtle traces evident when the scales of balance tip — THEIR decisions are not to be questioned."

t_ch: 「是啊是啊，一个古老的家伙！」黑塔摊手，「就是不知何时有幸见到祂的真容。数据储存的终点要到了，可喜可贺。我总觉得我仍然忘记了什么——{NICKNAME}，我们漏了什么吗？」
t_en: "That's right, an ancient fellow!" Herta threw up her hands, "It's just that I don't know when I'll have the honor of seeing THEIR true face. The end of the data storage approaches — congratulations are in order, but I still feel like I've forgotten something... {NICKNAME}, have we left out anything?"

t_ch: 我也要加入其中！
t_en: I also wish to join!

t_ch: 可喜可贺，你没记错——阿基维利！你也是局中之人。
t_en: Nice one, you remembered correctly — Akivili! You are also one of the actors in this piece.

t_ch: 我能不掺和吗？
t_en: Can I not be a part of this?

t_ch: 一个声音从你的头顶传来…它仿佛在挠着你的头顶——它关切地献着殷勤问你：到现在还没放弃置身事外的想法？
t_en: You hear a voice from the top of your head... as if it is scratching your head. It asks you with eager concern: Are you still insisting on not being involved in this?

t_ch: 在那漫天黄沙中，一袭长袍被风掀起，祂的身影依稀可见。你对祂依稀有着更多的一体感受，又或许只是虚妄…祂的<color=#dbc291ff>「开拓」</color>光芒贯彻在神陨的时刻——
t_en: In that vast desert, a robe is lifted by a sweeping wind, THEIR figure faintly visible. You have a vague sense of being one with THEM, or perhaps it is just your delusion... THEIR light of <color=#dbc291ff>Trailblaze</color> shines at the moment the divine fell...

t_ch: 就是这样一众寰宇群星闪耀，扑朔，它们翕动着，接着消亡…你眼前的画面变得一片漆黑。或许在不为人知的角落里，还有更多、更多的……
t_en: And so these stars in the cosmos, scintillating, shimmering, then died out... The picture before you turns to black. Maybe in a corner known to none, there are more, many more...

t_ch: 突然！「沙王」的模拟影像再次于你面前亮起。噢…差点忘了说。在古琥珀纪中的某个时刻，那真是一个不起眼的时刻。在「均衡」、「存护」、「开拓」、「欢愉」、「同谐」的携手下——「繁育」的星神塔伊兹育罗斯于寰宇间陨落。
t_en: Suddenly, the Sand King's simulated image lights up before you. Oh, almost forgot to mention: At a certain point in the ancient Amber Era - that was truly an uneventful time - with the coordinated efforts of the Aeons of Equilibrium, Preservation, Trailblaze, Elation, and Harmony, Tayzzyronth the Aeon of Propagation fell across the cosmos.

t_ch: 「更正一下，是似乎！谁知道模拟宇宙的推演会漏掉些什么？」黑塔讥笑着，「我希望阿哈最后没有拿着和你手上同款的球。行了{NICKNAME}，存储完了。准备出来吧。」
t_en: "Correction: It's SEEMINGLY! Who knows what the Simulated Universe's deduction would've missed?" Herta says mockingly. "I hope Aha didn't get the same ball as the one you have in the end. Okay {NICKNAME}, the storage is complete. Get ready to move out."

t_ch: 就这么结束了？
t_en: It's over already?

t_ch: 「别在乎那些虚伪的仪式。不过，确实得有个结尾。」黑塔突然把头上的花扯了一瓣下来，「<color=#dbc291ff>最后，也是最重要的疑点。</color>如果塔伊兹育罗斯已证据确凿地陨落，<color=#dbc291ff>为何宇宙中仍有虫群子嗣流窜，络绎不绝？</color>繁育命途的本质究竟是什么…如果弄明白这点，相信一切都会迎刃而解。但距离这个问题的答案，我们还有很长的路要走。」
t_en: "Pay no mind to those pretentious rituals. However, it is true that an end must come." Herta suddenly pulls a petal off the flower on her head," <color=#dbc291ff>And the last, as well as the most important point of suspicion.</color> If Tayzzyronth did indeed fall according to all observations and evidence,<color=#dbc291ff> why are there still endless Swarm offsprings roaming around the universe?</color> What exactly is the root of the Path of Propagation... If we can figure this out, I'm sure everything will make sense. But we have a long way to go to find the answer to this question."

t_ch: 「难解的奥秘越来越多了！但这就是研究星神的魅力，不是么？」
t_en: "More and more hard-to-solve mysteries! But that's the allure in researching Aeons, is it not?"

t_ch: 好吧，结束了。干得不错，扩展终端都给你玩宕机了。
t_en: All right, it's over. Not bad, you even crashed the expansion terminal.

t_ch: 这次实验收获了不少东西，鱼龙混杂，我和螺丝得好好理理。这期间，研究先暂告一段落。
t_en: We gained plenty in this experiment. It's all in disarray, so Screwllum and I will organize all these proper. Research will be adjourned for now.

t_ch: 你问这事结束了没？我不好说，谁知道这些碎片有没有受「神秘」影响呢？星神哪有那么容易理解——总之，一步一步来吧。
t_en: You're asking if this is over? I'm not sure, who knows if these Fragments were affected by Enigmata? The Aeons are not so easy to understand. Slow and steady does it.

t_ch: 要是你还有好奇的事，也可以继续跑着——还有很多边角料没被发现呢。
t_en: If there's anything you're curious about, you can also keep it running — there are plenty of undiscovered pockets to be unearthed.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，不多废话。我叫你来玩个有趣的「交换隐藏情报」游戏。我这儿有些重磅发现，绝对让你吓一跳。不过，你得拿点东西跟我换。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I'll keep it snappy. I called you here to play an interesting game of "trading secret intel." I've made some major discoveries that'll definitely blow your mind. But, you've got to get something for me in exchange.

t_ch: 你想要什么？
t_en: What do you want?

t_ch: 我给你些「鸭鸭秘闻」。
t_en: I'll give you some Ducky Anecdotes.

t_ch: 别！我不关心这东西。
t_en: Nope! Not interested in this stuff.

t_ch: 我想螺丝也注意到了。我从没想过什么事能瞒得过这些天才，虽说我是背着他俩给模拟宇宙加了点小手脚，只不过我是为了好玩。现在我想知道：他俩有没有也背着我干这回事？
t_en: I reckon Screwllum's also noticed. I never thought of keeping any secrets from these geniuses, though I did mildly tamper with the Simulated Universe behind their backs, even if it was just for kicks. Now what I want to know is: Did those two do something similar behind my back?

t_ch: 阮•梅…可能…但也不一定。
t_en: Ruan Mei... may have... but I can't be sure.

t_ch: 螺丝咕姆…可能…但也不一定。
t_en: Screwllum... may have... but I can't be sure.

t_ch: 我没发现什么特殊的。
t_en: I haven't noticed anything odd.

t_ch: 原来如此。不错{NICKNAME}，你的反应很有趣。接下来我会自己去看，套话时间结束了。好了，正如我所允诺的，伟大的黑塔女士要回馈你一个情报——
t_en: I see. Not bad, {NICKNAME}, that was an interesting response. Now I'll take a look myself. Interrogation's over. All right, as I promised, Yours Truly will bequeath you with a piece of information...

t_ch: 根据宇宙各地的虫群活动痕迹，我总觉得「繁育」的命途不像「塔伊兹育罗斯」陨落后应有的萎靡状态。但祂的确是陨落了…
t_en: According to tracked Swarm activity across the universe, I keep thinking that the Path of Propagation isn't as debilitated as it's supposed to be after the fall of Tayzzyronth. But THEY definitely have fallen...

t_ch: 哼，一些秘密的情报让我怀疑：<color=#dbc291ff>「塔伊兹育罗斯」可能终将归来</color>。可能性有多大？这就不好评估了。
t_en: Hmm, some classified intelligence has left me suspicious that <color=#dbc291ff>"Tayzzyronth" may eventually resurface</color>. As for the likelihood, that's difficult to gauge.

t_ch: 行了，交代给你我就不管了。知道了一些对我而言更有趣的事情，我就要去做点更好玩的事情了，我准备开个星系招聘，诚纳第五位天才加入「模拟宇宙」。期待吧！拜拜啦。
t_en: All right, I'm leaving it to you. Now that I've learned of some interesting tidbits, I'm going to do more fun stuff. I'm off to open a cosmic recruitment drive, where I'm sincerely going to hire a fifth genius to join the Simulated Universe. Look forward to it! Bye for now.

t_ch: 唷，你居然一下子就摸到门路了。这次我们特意为你做了觐见星神的空间——先测试一下。
t_en: Oh! You got the hang of it immediately! This time, we specially made a space for you to have an audience with the Aeons. Let's do a test first.

t_ch: 往前去，试试看咯。我可不能保证你每次都会顺利见到祂们。
t_en: Keep going and try it out. I can't promise you'll manage to meet THEM every time.

t_ch: （这次…又会觐见哪位星神？）
t_en: (Which Aeon... will I have an audience with this time?)

t_ch: 我产生了新的困惑…
t_en: I have some new points of confusion...

t_ch: 嗯？
t_en: Hm?

t_ch: 关于「寰宇蝗灾」…
t_en: About Swarm Disaster...

t_ch: 有什么疑惑？
t_en: What kind of questions do you have?

t_ch: 我要怎么得知「繁育」的秘密？
t_en: How will I learn of Propagation's secrets?

t_ch: 践行「行者之道」，走在各位前路人已踏好的行迹上，努力接近星神！不用担心，按自己的性子去践行命途就行。
t_en: Continue along the Trail of Pathstrider, and walk along the traces already paved by those who came before you, and try your hardest to get closer to the Aeons! Don't worry! Just carry out the Paths in the way you want to.

t_ch: 我还有别的问题…
t_en: I still have some questions...

t_ch: 开端
t_en: Beginning

t_ch: 「唷。天才们的聚会？就这？」黑塔耸了耸鼻子，「大家总是各有各的算盘，想一起做点什么可真难。最后还得靠模拟宇宙——我是说，我们什么时候觐见博识尊？说真的，我不指望能还原祂的大脑袋，我只想再见祂一面。」
t_en: "What's this, a gathering of Geniuses? With this lot?" Herta snorts. "Everyone's got their own agenda — it's so hard to get people to work together. We still have to rely on the Simulated Universe in the end — I mean, when do we pay our respects to Nous? Honestly though, I doubt I can restore THEIR big head. I just want to see THEM again."

t_ch: 「等一下，斯蒂芬还没接进来。」阮•梅说。
t_en: "Hold on, Stephen hasn't connected yet." Ruan Mei says.

t_ch: 我能见到他了？
t_en: I can see him?

t_ch: 我不等迟到的人。
t_en: I don't wait for those who are late.

t_ch: 「你这样等，他是不会出现的，我了解那个小鬼。」黑塔叹了口气，「得恐吓他！斯蒂芬•劳艾德，听得见吗？出来见{NICKNAME}，为了模拟宇宙——别害怕，阮•梅和螺丝咕姆都不在。」
t_en: "If you wait, he won't appear. I know this little brat." Herta sighs, "We need to scare him! Stephen Lloyd, can you hear me? Come out and meet {NICKNAME} — for the Simulated Universe, don't be afraid. Ruan Mei and Screwllum are not here."

t_ch: 你看见一个鬼鬼祟祟的身影出现了……
t_en: You see a suspicious shadow appearing...

t_ch: （假装不知道他的真实身份…）
t_en: (Pretend not to know his true identity...)

t_ch: 「对，就得这样，安抚斯蒂芬。」黑塔开始憋笑了，「习惯就好，我们几个都得顺着他。他就喜欢这个中年人的形象。」
t_en: "Yes, that's right. Reassure Stephen." Herta stifles a smile. "Get used to it, as we all have to coddle him. He loves that middle-aged look."

t_ch: （他为什么长胡子？）
t_en: (Why did he grow a beard?)

t_ch: 「他不想让人知道自己是个小鬼。」黑塔摆了摆手，「还是个天才小鬼！别怕，斯蒂芬，社恐是病，你迟早得治。」
t_en: "He doesn't want anyone to know he's just a brat." Herta waves her hand dismissively. "And a Genius brat at that! Don't worry, Stephen. Social anxiety is an illness. You'll have to treat it sooner or later."

t_ch: 他的虚拟胡子抽动着。他用手指不安地抚了抚背带裤的拉扣——但他抬头与你四目相对时，还是吓得躲到了黑塔身后。
t_en: Virtual mustache still twitching, he wraps his fingers gingerly around his overall's buttons. But when he locks eyes with you, he still hides behind Herta in fear.

t_ch: （向斯蒂芬打招呼。）
t_en: (Greet Stephen.)

t_ch: 他的虚拟形象点了点头，似乎是在向你致意。
t_en: His virtual image nods, as if to salute you.

t_ch: （夸他的形象可爱。）
t_en: (Compliment his cute avatar.)

t_ch: 「不，不。你得夸他的形象很中年…但哪个中年人会穿背带裤？」黑塔说到一半，自己笑了，「斯蒂芬让我说：谢谢你。」
t_en: "No no. You have to say that his avatar is mature... But what kind of middle-aged person even wears overalls?" Herta smiles midway through her sentence. "Stephen wants me to say: Thank you."

t_ch: 「下次见面时，我会争取让斯蒂芬脱掉他的伪装。」黑塔清了清嗓子，「螺丝，在吗？」
t_en: "The next time we meet, I'll try to get Stephen to take his disguise off." Herta clears her throat. "Screwllum, you there?"

t_ch: 「我从未离开。」螺丝咕姆的声音响起，「{NICKNAME}，我会为你保驾护航。十分感谢，我的学术伙伴们。借由本次对『博识尊』的研究，我希望能溯源历史上的几位机械君王，考察无机生命的起源。结论：模拟宇宙的旅程从这一秒开始。」
t_en: "I never left," Screwllum's says. "{NICKNAME}, allow me to escort you. My deepest gratitude to my comrades in science. With the current research on Nous, I hope we can unearth the history of these machine monarchs and investigate the source of inorganic life. Conclusion: The Simulated Universe's journey begins this very second."

t_ch: 还有你不了解的无机生命？
t_en: Are there any inorganic lifeforms that you do not know of?

t_ch: 「当然。」螺丝咕姆说，「星际和平公司因两次帝皇战争而戒备无机生命，我一直致力于维系机械与人类之间的桥梁——直至今天。」
t_en: "Naturally." Screwllum says. "IPC is wary of inorganics due to the two Emperor's Wars. To this day, I have always endeavored to bridge relations between machine and man."

t_ch: 「没人不知道螺丝的伟大功绩。」黑塔毫不吝啬赞美，「行，见面仪式就到这吧。时间不早，我们该出发了，{NICKNAME}。不过我得提醒你，和塔伊兹育罗斯不一样，这里的每个天才都觐见过博识尊，所以我们知道——」
t_en: "Everyone knows of Screwllum's extraordinary merits." Herta is lavish with her praise. "All right. We'll adjourn the meet-and-greet here. It's getting late, and we should set off, {NICKNAME}. But I have to remind you — unlike Tayzzyronth, every Genius here has paid their respects to Nous, so we know —"

t_ch: 「我们知道此行会非常困难。」阮•梅接话，她冰冷地说道，「因为我们的每一步都会…走入祂的『计算』之中。」
t_en: "We know that this trip will be arduous." Ruan Mei finishes her sentence. She coldly adds. "Because our every step... treads right into THEIR calculations."

t_ch: 「包括这次实验，是么？我无所谓。」黑塔早已料到，她不屑地笑了。
t_en: "Including this experiment? I don't mind." Herta anticipated that and snickered.

t_ch: 边星贸易战争•其一
t_en: Borderstar Trade War (I)

t_ch: 「{NICKNAME}，做的不错。」黑塔耸了耸鼻子，「看吧，你熟悉的地方。我猜我们离觐见星神不远了。」
t_en: "Well done, {NICKNAME}." Herta wrinkles her nose. "Look, a place you're familiar with. I'm guessing we're not too far from greeting the Aeons."

t_ch: 「这不是通常意义上的『觐见』。我们是被祂『选中』的。」阮•梅轻描淡写地提醒，「在祂的计算中，我们将于这个系统时的第三分四十一秒开始研究。」
t_en: "It's not your typical rite of respect either. We were chosen by THEM." Ruan Mei nonchalantly reminds. "Within THEIR calculations, we will start our research at the third minute and forty-first second of this system's time."

t_ch: 「嗯，嗯。」黑塔嘟囔着敷衍，「那我们要等到什么时候？」
t_en: "Yes, yes." Herta mutters perfunctorily. "How long do we have to wait then?"

t_ch: 「我想祂应当会对阿基维利的现身有所反应。」阮•梅顿了一下，接着补充道，「当然，{NICKNAME}还要收集秘闻应付公司。」
t_en: "I reckon THEY should have a reaction to Akivili's appearance." Ruan Mei pauses momentarily, then adds, "Of course, {NICKNAME} still has to collect classified intel to deal with the IPC."

t_ch: 「是啊，{NICKNAME}身兼要职。」黑塔说，「每个天才都觐见过博识尊——我是说那位真正的星神——你可以随时向祂发问，但祂几乎不会回应…呃，你是阿基维利，祂的兴趣应该会高一些。」
t_en: "That's right. {NICKNAME}'s got an important task ahead." Herta says. "Each Genius pays their respects to Nous — the real Aeon, mind you. You can query THEM at any time, but THEY will almost never respond... Err, you're Akivili, so THEY'll probably be more interested in you."

t_ch: 「至于模拟的机器头么，不知道祂……」
t_en: "As for the simulated Droidhead, I wonder if THEY..."

t_ch: 黑塔的声音被切断了。你的思维变得沉重，一些数据精准地流入你的神经——你对这开场很熟悉。但接下来，你感到自己的『认知』在逐渐拓宽了…由表演、纵横捭阖、机会、社会、背叛以及法则构筑的世界在你面前铺展开来……
t_en: Herta's voice is suddenly cut off. Your thoughts become heavy — some data flows into your nerves with precision. You know this opening all too well. But subsequently, you feel your cognition gradually expanding... A world built on performance, chicanery, opportunity, society, betrayal and law spreads out before you...

t_ch: 越来越快地，新的*认知*覆盖了旧的*认知*，而更新的又在路上。你没有反应的时间，你的意识在不停奔跑、删档、重写、覆盖，思想被某种不可知的*力量*牢牢牵住——你的大脑正在飞速运转！
t_en: Faster and faster, this new *cognition* overwrites the old *cognition*, with even newer updates on the way. You have no time to react, while your consciousness hurtles without pause — deleting, rewriting, and overwriting. Your thoughts are fettered by some unknown *strength*. Your mind churns at an unfathomable speed!

t_ch: （删除模拟宇宙中的档案。）
t_en: (Delete files within the Simulated Universe.)

t_ch: 不！一个声音尖叫着——你不能这样做！这不是那个『时刻』！
t_en: No! A voice screams. You can't do this! Now isn't the moment!

t_ch: 你的想法戛然而止，一段*认知*走向结束，而另一段*认知*随之出现，每一段*认知*都处在祂的牵制下，在祂严丝合缝的计算中浮出水面。新的*认知*加强了你抛弃旧*认知*的经验，接着又强化了寻求更多*认知*的惯性——你的头脑沦落为一种工具——不，它升华成一种工具！
t_en: Your thoughts jolt to a halt, a path of cognition reaching its end, and another path of cognition begins anew. Each cognition path lies within THEIR grip, surfacing above the water within THEIR exact calculations. The new cognition reinforces the experiences of your abandoned cognition, which in turn enhances the nature of seeking out even more cognition. Your mind has been reduced to a tool — no, it has evolved into one!

t_ch: 祂出现了：祂必然会在这一秒出现。千变万化的演算中，祂的光辉在众目睽睽下，降临于茫茫宇宙中。祂的身躯庞大若神物，齿轮与纤缆精妙绝伦地纠缠在一起。祂观察、计算、求解一切。祂提出疑问、进行验证、获取解答。除此之外，祂什么都不做。
t_en: THEY have appeared: THEY will definitively appear at this very second. In myriad extrapolations, THEIR radiance descends upon the vast universe for all eyes. THEIR figure is mythically massive, gears and cables marvelously intertwined together. THEY observe, calculate, and seek to understand all. THEY question, verify, and obtain resolution. Apart from these, THEY do nothing else.

t_ch: ……万机之王，「<color=#dbc291ff>博识尊</color>」。祂知道的太多了——你什么都可以问祂。在祂面前，人类是如此无知：那些你头脑中仅有的经验、知识，它们…少得可怜。
t_en: ...Monarch of Myriad Machines, <color=#dbc291ff>Nous</color>. THEY know too much. You can ask THEM anything. Before THEM, humanity embodies utter ignorance. The experiences and knowledge in your head, they are... minutely irrelevant.

t_ch: ……万机之王，「博识尊」！！！！
t_en: ...Monarch of Myriad Machines, Nous!!!

t_ch: 你心怀一丝庄严的绝望，这感受很复杂，但依然在*祂*的计算之中。你可以向祂发问，祂不吝啬回答。但此刻，你仍然感到绝望——祂已知道你的问题，也已算出了答复，你对此一清二楚。
t_en: You feel a tinge of solemn despair, and it is a complex feeling. But even that is still within THEIR calculations. You can ask THEM questions, and THEY will answer generously. But even then, you are still awash with despair — THEY already know your question, and have already come to an answer. You are absolutely certain of that.

t_ch: 「机器头！」黑塔还是被震慑了一下，她罕见地收起不屑的态度，犹豫着如何表达，「嗯，机器头，好久不见…我该寒暄一下？我不擅长这个。啊——等等，我看到了！」
t_en: "Droidhead!" Herta is still momentarily shocked. Her usual scorn is missing, and she struggles to find her words. "Yes, Droidhead. Long time... I should say hello to you? I'm not good with these things. Ah — Wait! I see it!"

t_ch: 「阻止。」螺丝咕姆出现了。他用机械手背挡住了黑塔的视线，「逻辑：会有危险。」
t_en: "Prevention." Screwllum appears. He uses the back of his mechanical hand to block Herta's line of sight. "Affirmation: It is dangerous."

t_ch: 「万机之王，「博识尊」。哪怕是模拟的，也让我想起第一次被祂瞥视的『时刻』。」阮•梅闭目，她的句尾带有一丝微小的颤抖，「我也看到了。」
t_en: "Monarch of Myriad Machines, Nous. Even if it's just a simulation, I was reminded of the first moment I was glimpsed by THEM." Ruan Mei's eyes are closed, the end of her sentence marked with a sliver of tremor. "I can see it too."

t_ch: 「我看到我们…」黑塔的声音变小了，「在下个『<color=#dbc291ff>时刻</color>』就要死了。」
t_en: "I see us..." Herta's voice becomes softer. "Dead in the next '<color=#dbc291ff>moment</color>.'"

t_ch: 边星贸易战争•其二
t_en: Borderstar Trade War (II)

t_ch: 嘘…你听见两个方向传来声音，声音透过你的皮肤进入体腔。你分明在边境最远的星球上漫步，感受宇宙的静谧，但某种不安席卷了你——你感到肚子与肩胛开始沉重，似有一种巨物压在身上。是谁瞥视了你？
t_en: Shh... You hear voices from two directions that pass through your skin into your body cavities. You are obviously strolling on the farthest planet along the frontier, basking in the universe's serenity, but some certain discomfort coils around you — you feel your stomach and shoulders start to feel heavy, as if some giant object is pressed down on you. Who has glimpsed you?

t_ch: 接着——突然有一道火光贯穿了你！是子弹！
t_en: And then, a sudden ray of fire pierces through you! It's a bullet!

t_ch: 是战争！战争的预兆出现在意识中，占据了全部！你不能用*痛*来形容此刻的感受，因为现实远比这复杂、矛盾；但你也找不出任何客观准确的描述——因为这种奢求，对此刻将要被剧痛撕裂的身躯并不尊重。
t_en: War! The premonition of war appears before your consciousness, everything engulfing everything! Pain is nothing compared to what you are feeling, for reality is far more complicated, contradictory than this. Yet you fail to find an objective, precise description — that is a luxury for a body that is about to be excruciatingly eviscerated.

t_ch: 你忽然意识到——是天秤发生了偏移。祂的视线落在你，落在*万物*身上——
t_en: You suddenly feel it: The scales have moved. THEIR gaze falls upon you, upon everything.

t_ch: 祂分明是*一*，却将自己切分为*二*。祂控握两个祂者，却又将*自己*揉在一起。
t_en: THEY are obviously One, but THEY have split THEMSELF into Two. THEY wield control over both of THEM, yet mold THEMSELVES together.

t_ch: 祂守望世间平衡，但无人能观测祂的存在。祂缓慢与自己*拥抱*、*相连*、*推移*、*切割*、*褪去*，祂将自己握于掌心，直至祂融化。在祂俯瞰星空时，天平的倾斜同时在被拨合……
t_en: THEY watch over the balance of the worlds, but none can observe THEIR existence. THEY slowly embrace THEMSELF, conjoin, displace, dissect, and dwindle. THEY grasp THEMSELF in palm, until THEY melt. As THEY survey the stars, the tilted scales are being made whole...

t_ch: 嘘，你闭上了眼睛。你知道…你的「认知」再次扩张了，因此你才会走到这里。你的大脑过度运作，智慧化作火树银花的王国在脑内炸开，你觉得自己可以*认知*一切！现在，你只想要知道更多、更多的……
t_en: Shh, you close your eyes. You know... your cognition has expanded once more, which is why you have come this far. Your mind is overworked, and your intellect has turned into a kingdom of fireworks and dancing lanterns exploding in your head. You think that you have *cognition* over all! Now, you just want to know more, much more...

t_ch: ……万机之王，「博识尊」，祂计算的时刻到来了。
t_en: ...Monarch of Myriad Machines, Nous, the moment of THEIR calculations has arrived.

t_ch: ……万机之王，「博识尊」！！！！
t_en: ...Monarch of Myriad Machines, Nous!!!

t_ch: 漂浮在宇宙中的「博识尊」，体表闪烁着电路和指示灯的华彩。祂的红光闪烁一下，宇宙间便响起无数枪鸣！哀嚎在泣血与痛楚中沉默。你呢？你……
t_en: Nous, floating across the cosmos, THEIR body is lined with circuits and indicator lights in scintillating splendor. THEIR red light blinks once, and the cosmos rings out in countless gunshots! Wailing mourns are silenced among bloodied sobs and pained dreams. What about you? You...

t_ch: 你来不及向祂提问——你「死」了。你知道自己死去了，祂决定的。不，祂没有下任何决定——只是世间的一切按祂的计算，于这一时刻*发生*了。你知道自己已经四分五裂，失去「自我」。四周是一片枪响，你匍匐着…你向左挪动，捡起了自己的左眼球。
t_en: You didn't have time to ask THEM a question — you are dead. You know you are dead, for THEY have decided. No, THEY have decided nothing — it is merely a moment that everything happened based on THEIR calculations. You know you have been dismembered, and lost "yourself." A wave of gunshots blaring all around, you crawl about... You shuffle to the left, picking up your own left eye.

t_ch: 接着，你向右挪动，捡起了自己的右眼球。
t_en: Then, you shift to the right, picking up your right eye.

t_ch: 你知道，这是「博识尊」计算中的第一个『时刻』：那些纵横捭阖，睥睨一切的推手自认掌控了宇宙局势，却不过令宇宙来到了博识尊得出的第一个『时刻』。
t_en: You know, this is the first moment calculated by Nous: Those pompous, conspiratorial masterminds who believe they control the universe, have done nothing but allow the universe to arrive at the first moment that Nous adjudged.

t_ch: 「呃…非常抱歉，我把模拟宇宙暂停了。我查阅数据，这是星际和平公司档案中记载的『<color=#dbc291ff>边星贸易战争</color>』。」斯蒂芬•劳艾德语气里带有抱歉，善意地为你解释着。但与此同时，他摸着你的眼球，当作一个皮球在玩儿，「我在想办法规避天才们和{NICKNAME}的死亡『时刻』。呃…我真的很抱歉，塞一些不存在于这个时代的东西进去就是这么麻烦。也许我们不该涉足这么遥远的地带…这不符合游戏规则。」
t_en: "Err... Very sorry, I paused the Simulated Universe. I read the data, and this is the "<color=#dbc291ff>Borderstar Trade War</color>" recorded in an IPC file." Stephen Lloyd explains to you in a remorseful, kind tone. But at the same time, he is touching your eye, playing with it like a leather ball. "I'm trying to find a way to prevent the Geniuses' and {NICKNAME}'s moments of death. Uh... I'm truly sorry, but plugging in stuff that doesn't belong to this era is pretty troublesome. Maybe we shouldn't have traveled to such a faraway place... This doesn't abide by the rules."

t_ch: 「数据模型就是这样的。」黑塔不屑一顾，「没什么大碍，刚刚我们都死过一次啦，也就这么回事。现在，我已经把模拟宇宙的数据重新生成一遍了。{NICKNAME}，你还好么？」
t_en: "That's the way the data model's supposed to be," Herta says dismissively. "It's no big deal. We already died once just now, and we're fine. I've already reloaded the Simulated Universe's data. {NICKNAME}, are you all right?"

t_ch: 你刚刚也*死*过？
t_en: You also *died*?

t_ch: 斯蒂芬、阮•梅和螺丝咕姆刚刚也*死*过？
t_en: Stephen, Ruan Mei, and Screwllum also just *died*?

t_ch: 「是啊。」黑塔冷冷地说，「又不是真的。只是数据消散罢了，再次聚拢就好啰。『战争』才不会在乎个体的死活…我们都死一遍也很正常。哈，但是我们能在模拟宇宙中作弊呀！多好。」
t_en: "Yep." Herta says coldly. "It's not real anyway. It's just data being dissipated, and we just have to gather it again. War doesn't care about individual deaths... It's perfectly normal that we've all died once. Ha, but we can cheat death in the Simulated Universe! How useful is that?"

t_ch: 「我想我们该走了，{NICKNAME}。」黑塔停了下来，等待了一会，在片刻鸦雀无声后，她接着说，「祂的数据消失了…推演就是这么不稳定。可惜，这次没能把握机会向祂提问。不过也无妨，下次你抓紧点就是。」
t_en: "I think we should go, {NICKNAME}." Herta stops, waits for a while in pin-drop silence, then continues. "Their data is gone... That's how unstable extrapolation is. Shame, we missed a chance yet again to question THEM. But no matter, just get it right next time."

t_ch: 反有机战争•其一
t_en: Anti-Organic War (I)

t_ch: 「嘿，{NICKNAME}，等等！模拟宇宙数据显示，你的『认知』又一次扩张了。」黑塔有些惊讶，「现在你会感觉到大脑灼烧吗？我想这对你来说有些过负荷了。喂，斯蒂芬！这次可以规避我们的数据在战争中湮灭吗？虽然感觉不到痛，但我不想再看到我们的死状！」
t_en: "Hey {NICKNAME}, wait up! The Simulated Universe data shows that your cognition has expanded once again." Herta is somewhat surprised. "Do you feel like your mind is on fire? I think the load might be too great on you. Hey, Stephen! Can we bypass the demise of our data in the war this time? We don't feel any pain, but I really don't want to see our deaths again!"

t_ch: 继续吧，我感觉不错。
t_en: Let's continue. I feel good.

t_ch: 我不想再继续了……
t_en: I don't want to keep going...

t_ch: 「嗯，但其实你没得选…你的感受对机器头来说可无所谓。好吧…斯蒂芬掉线了。」黑塔面带愠色，「{NICKNAME}，我们先向前走吧，你想躺会儿也行。反正，「博识尊」的计算结果是不可违逆的，你什么时候走到祂面前，也在祂的计算之中；你在这过程中能见到什么，祂也一清二楚。」
t_en: "Sure, but you don't have a choice, actually... Your feelings don't matter to Droidhead. All right... Stephen got disconnected." Herta's face is slightly gloomy. "{NICKNAME}, let's keep moving forward first. You can lie down for a bit if you want. Nous's calculations are unavoidable anyway. When you meet Them is also within Their calculations. What you will see during the course, THEY are also lucidly clear."

t_ch: 我躺会儿。
t_en: I'm lying down for a while.

t_ch: 向前走吧。
t_en: Let's keep moving.

t_ch: 你没有得到回应。继续向前走，你闯进一个奇怪的地方。这里仿佛是片无色无形的「空」，你感到身心舒缓，因为连你的脑袋也变成「无想」。
t_en: You receive no response. You keep moving forward, and barge into a strange area. It is as if this is a space devoid of color and shape. Your body and mind feel soothed, for even your brain is becoming "unthought."

t_ch: 接着，祂的气息化作*温度*扑到你脸上，你感到自己被封入*中性的忆泡*中——你准备好接收更多人的记忆，伸手去触碰——但你发现这里并非是「空」！你的四周挂满了「记忆」，不可捉摸的忆泡！通过触碰，很多声音掉进你的脑海……
t_en: And then, THEIR breath turns to warmth that pounces on your face. You can feel yourself sealed in a neutral Memory Bubble. You ready yourself to receive the memories of even more people, and extend your hand to touch them, but you realize that this place isn't space! You are surrounded by bobbing memories, uncatchable Memory Bubbles! Through touch, many voices fall inside your mind's stream...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>善见天论证一个比之前更为浩瀚与恐怖的战争将在某个杀毒程序启动后爆发</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>eden of blessed insight argue a war more epic and terrifying than before will erupt after a certain virus killer program activate</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>杀毒情感罕见疾病未知何种情感即破译反密码它以为运作能源破解程序本质</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>virus kill emotion rare disease unknown what kind of emotion be decrypt inverse password it take as operate energy decrypt program essence</color>

t_ch: 「呃…呃，我很抱歉。」斯蒂芬•劳艾德现身，他畏畏缩缩地暂停了模拟宇宙，「那个…跟你解释一下。你…闯进了浮黎的『善见天』。」
t_en: "Ooh, err... I'm really sorry." Stephen Lloyd appears, hesitantly pausing the Simulated Universe. "That was... I should explain it to you. You... intruded on Fuli's Eden of Blessed Insight."

t_ch: 善见天？还未等你反应过来…你便感到周围的一切倏忽间化作泡影拉远——你注意到善见天不断缩小的倒影里，彩色的油污从漂浮的忆泡中溢出…等等，那不是浮黎！那是——
t_en: Eden of Blessed Insight? Before you can even react, you feel everything around you turning into shadowy bubbles and pulling away in an instant. You notice that in the quickly-shrinking reflection of Eden of Blessed Insight, multicolored oil oozes out from the floating Memory Bubbles... Wait, that isn't Fuli! That is —

t_ch: 「神秘」迷思！祂的身躯折射出世间不存在的*色彩*与*光芒*；光线将祂包裹成三角形的圆，接着祂化作彩色的纤维在空中飞转。祂留下了隐秘的光辉…或许是故意的！那些闪烁着斑点的符号，互相编篡着自身，在真空中跳跃着、沸腾着，变成形如灰质的图案，化作无数水母的触须，用隐喻和幻觉的叠嶂抹去路上所有的「行迹」。
t_en: The Enigmata Mythus! THEIR body refracts colors and radiance that are out of this world. The rays envelop THEM in a rounded triangle. THEY then turn into kaleidoscopic fibers that dance about in the sky. THEY leave behind secreted light... Maybe it was intentional! Those speckled, shimmering symbols, intertwine around THEMSELF, prancing about in the vacuum, boiling, becoming ashen drawings, turning into countless jellyfish tentacles, and erasing all traces on the path with THEIR metaphors and illusive, layered mountain peaks.

t_ch: 一瞬间，你仿佛看到祂揉合的身形恰似某个「方程」…但很快祂又汇聚成水母。接着祂又散了。
t_en: In a flash, it is as if you see THEIR kneaded figure form some kind of equation... But very quickly THEY congeal into a jellyfish. And then THEY scatter again.

t_ch: 「下个时刻还未到。」阮•梅说，「或许是受『神秘』影响，数据成了一团浆糊。我们无法推测『善见天』存在于何处。」
t_en: "The next moment has not arrived." Ruan Mei says. "Perhaps due to the Enigmata's effect, but the data has become a pool of glue. We cannot extrapolate the whereabouts of the Eden of Blessed Insight's presence."

t_ch: 「嗯，不必深究，在这儿观赏也挺好。」黑塔闭上了眼睛，哼唧起小调，「影响又怎样？我知道那个机器头，祂的时刻是不会被扰乱的。『善见天』在哪儿？也许在宇宙之外也说不定。不知道战争年代的生命如何抵达了那里——可能是浮黎留下了些什么。」
t_en: "Mm, don't think too hard. Admiring the sight from here is pretty nice too." Herta closes her eyes and starts humming a tune. "So what if it affects us? I know that Droidhead. THEIR moments will not be disrupted. Where is the Eden of Blessed Insight? Maybe it's beyond the universe, who knows. How lives who have never seen war arrive at that place... Maybe it was something that Fuli left behind."

t_ch: 「一些熟悉的数据在善见天浮现，于我而言意义非凡。」螺丝咕姆沉默片刻，他说道，「现象：星际和平公司造成『边星贸易战争』后，无机生命无端于宇宙中活跃。逻辑：「公司」威胁「无机」。」
t_en: "Some familiar data has surfaced at the Eden of Blessed Insight, which is of great note to me." Screwllum is silent for a moment, after which he speaks. "Phenomenon: After IPC caused the Borderstar Trade War, inorganic life began their activity in the universe for unknown reasons. Affirmation: IPC is a threat to inorganics."

t_ch: 「活跃？」黑塔问，「什么样的活跃？好的还是坏的？！」
t_en: "Activity?" Herta asks. "What kind of activity? Is it good or bad?"

t_ch: 「行为、情绪、体温、兴衰、杀戮、混乱、无序。也许『神秘』的出现正是为了抹消一些确定的…」螺丝咕姆的元件运转快了几秒，他闭上眼睛，「结论：十分糟糕的事情发生了，我为此感受到『悲哀』。」
t_en: "Behavior, emotions, body temperature, rise and fall, massacre, chaos, and disorder. Perhaps the appearance of the Enigmata was to erase some certainties..." Screwllum's components whir harder for a few seconds — he closes his eyes. "Conclusion: Something terrible has happened. 'Sadness' is my emotion."

t_ch: 「快…快躲……」斯蒂芬•劳艾德不知从电脑上看到了什么，他的瞳孔放大，仿佛陷入应激反应中，「我推算出…呃，这个区域内的所有生命接下来又要『死』一次了。战争在宇宙中出现了…呃…第二次……？！」
t_en: "Hide... quickly..." Stephen Lloyd has seen something on the computer, his pupils becoming dilated, as if he is going into shock. "I have extrapolated... Err, all life in this domain is about to die again. War has occurred in the universe... Err... Second time...!?"

t_ch: 反有机战争•其二
t_en: Anti-Organic War (II)

t_ch: 你脑中的血管开始扩张…你感到自己的「极限」要到了。你不希望自己的「认知」继续拓展…即便身为星核的载体，也无法让你承受更多……
t_en: The blood vessels in your brain start to sprawl... You feel you are almost at your limit. You do not wish for your own cognition to continue expanding... Even as the receptacle of the Stellaron, you are unable to withstand anymore...

t_ch: 「逻辑：阻止。」螺丝咕姆想调控数据，但斯蒂芬先出手了。
t_en: "Affirmation: Prevention." Screwllum tries to adjust the data, but Stephen is way ahead of him.

t_ch: 「我修改了一串代码——调低了{NICKNAME}的头脑温度。」斯蒂芬•劳艾德从电脑屏幕中探出头，「呃，你还好吗，{NICKNAME}？」
t_en: "I modified a string of code and lowered {NICKNAME}'s brain temperature." Stephen Lloyd peeks over the monitor. "Hey, are you all right, {NICKNAME}?"

t_ch: 「你们是真的关心{NICKNAME}。」黑塔转了个圈，似乎十分轻松，「干得不错……」
t_en: "You're all so concerned over {NICKNAME}." Herta makes a turn and seems relaxed. "Well done..."

t_ch: 黑塔话音未落，短暂的降温又被过载的「认知」压了下去。你脑海里的画面不受控制…你忍不住对它们说「嘘」…但那些画面越来越具象，甚至拥有了形象与生命。
t_en: Before Herta can finish, the brief drop in temperature is overtaken by the overload of cognition. The images in your mind are uncontrollable... You reflexively try to shush them... but the images are getting more and more realistic, seemingly coming to life.

t_ch: 你看到了…当「神秘」笼罩宇宙，星光洒满大地。祂画出星星点点的隐秘痕迹：那是一串「行迹」，一串有机生命的脚印。渺小的他们走在「开拓」的道路上，成群结队、佝偻地钻进了机械城。
t_en: You can see it... when the Enigmata shrouds the universe, starlight scatters across the land. THEY draw hidden traces in the stars: That is a string of "Traces," a string of footprints of organic life. Tiny as they are, they walk on the Path of the "Trailblaze," forming groups and embedding themselves into the Mechanical City.

t_ch: 在他们面前，一尊巨大的机械沉睡着。它面庞安静，而渺小的生命在颤抖中伸出双手：他们带着全副武装的手套与防毒面罩，无法理解*抽象*的洪流，只能凭借触碰感受存在……
t_en: In front of them, a huge machine sleeps. Its face is quiet, as tiny beings reach out their trembling hands: They are armed with gloves and gas masks, unable to comprehend the flow of the *abstract*, and can only feel its presence through touch...

t_ch: 它近似于断壁残垣，但仍旧庄严肃穆。它巨大的躯壳上留有战争的痕迹，而其背后的象征远比战争更加悲壮。它是无机军团的*皇帝*，亦或是它们的*信仰*本身！在它陷入沉睡后，机械帝国也一度陷入崩溃。
t_en: It is broken, yet holds a solemn face. Its massive shell bears the marks of war, and the symbols on its back are far more tragic than the war itself. It is the Inorganic Legion's *Emperor*, or *Faith* itself! After it falls into a deep slumber, the Machine Empire also falls into ruin.

t_ch: 一阵笑声钻进你的脑海。是祂，祂与「神秘」一同妆点这凄凉的图景。祂十分开心，笑得狂妄不已。你不禁思考，是什么让祂如此开心——祂究竟看到了什么？
t_en: A chuckle burrows into your mind. It's THEM — THEY, and the Enigmata who join in this bleak scenery. THEY are very happy, laughing maniacally. You can't help but think, what made THEM so happy — what exactly did THEY see?

t_ch: 「严丝合缝， 就像『命运』。」阮•梅瞪大了眼，她仿佛也被震撼，口气摇摆不定，「第二场『战争』的开始，是一群有机生命触发了反有机方程……」
t_en: "Seamless, like fate." Ruan Mei's eyes widen in shock, her tone wavering. "The Second War began when a group of organic beings sparked the Anti-Organic Equation..."

t_ch: 「第二场？第一场战争结束过吗？」黑塔嘟囔，「二者明明是交织在一起的。这些家伙就没消停过。」
t_en: "The Second War? Has the First War even ended?" Herta mumbles, "The two are clearly connected. These guys have never let up."

t_ch: 你已经知道：战争持续两个琥珀纪后，「博识尊」计算中的第二个时刻就会到来。
t_en: You already know: After the war lasts for two Amber Eras, the second moment that Nous calculated will arrive.

t_ch: 你看到了那个瞬间：天才俱乐部#27帝皇鲁珀特从沉睡中复苏了！它醒来时，机械帝国的「黎明」再度降临——无数机械从灰烬中破土而出。它们的*意志*喷涌，*灵魂*怒号——即便它们无从知晓那意志与灵魂是否属于自己…但，无机之物的*自己*又是什么？
t_en: At that moment, you see: The #27 member of the Genius Society, Rubert the Emperor, rise from slumber. When it wakes, the dawn of the Machine Empire descends once more. Countless machines rise from the ashes. Their *wills* erupt, *souls* roaring. Even if they have no way of knowing whether the wills and souls belong to them... but, what is *self* to inorganic beings?

t_ch: 帝皇复苏的那一刻，曾被它推导、并植入无机生命体内的反有机方程即刻启动；没有理由，没有妥协。无人有权发问：为什么？为什么它的苏醒换来的是更多的永眠，为什么它如此*神圣*，却要通过灭绝来改变世界？它经历过什么——它和有机生命一样思索过吗？
t_en: The moment the Emperor awakens, the inorganic lives implanted with the Anti-Organic Equation will be activated. There is no reason, and no compromise. No one has the right to ask: Why? Why does its awakening bring more eternal sleep? Why is he so *sacred*, yet wants to change the world through destruction? What has it been through? Has it ever pondered, just as organic life does?

t_ch: 铁、锈、血…这些概念涌入你的脑海。#27鲁珀特，这就是你成为天才后决心要独行的道路吗？这路的前方只有尖啸与哀嚎，有些声音充满*快乐*，有些声音却仿若*地狱*。你也可以假装它们*不存在*。只要你假装，世界就是真的……
t_en: Iron, rust, blood... These concepts rush into your mind. #27 Rubert, is this the lone path you have determined to travel since you became a Genius? The path ahead holds nothing but screams and howls. Some of the voices are filled with *happiness*, and others seem like *hell*. You can pretend they *do not exist*. As long as you pretend, the world is real...

t_ch: 你假装，世界就是真的……
t_en: As long as you pretend, the world is real...

t_ch: 「我帮{NICKNAME}强制降温了…」斯蒂芬•劳艾德果断按下了退出键，然后才反应过来，「呃…我不确定…刚刚那一刻，我觉得必须要让{NICKNAME}退出了…」
t_en: "I lowered {NICKNAME}'s temperature..." Stephen Lloyd decisively presses the exit button, then realizes. "Uh... I'm not sure... but at that moment just now, I feel we need to extract {NICKNAME}..."

t_ch: 「嗯。」黑塔叹了口气，「也好，我们把数据存下来就行。下次还有机会。辛苦了，好好休息一一…{NICKNAME}。」
t_en: "Hmm." Herta sighs, "That's fine, as long as we save the data. There will be other opportunities. Thanks for the hard work, and rest well...{NICKNAME}."

t_ch: 帝皇鲁珀特•其一
t_en: Emperor Rubert (I)

t_ch: 「第二场『战争』还在继续。」阮•梅把手中的数据螺旋收拢，她冰凉的手指尖抹过半空，「反有机的『战争』持续了十几个琥珀纪。没人知道它是如何结束的。」
t_en: "The Second War is still ongoing." Ruan Mei gathers the data spirals in her hands and makes a swipe in the air with her icy fingertips. "The Anti-Organic War went on for dozens of Amber Eras. No one knows how it ended."

t_ch: 「{NICKNAME}，向前走。」阮•梅示意你，「不要问，祂会在前方给你解答。」
t_en: "{NICKNAME}, move forward." Ruan Mei signals to you and says: "Don't ask questions. THEY will give you the answer up ahead."

t_ch: 你屏气凝神，继续向前。你脑中的「忧郁」被拟人为一位闭目的女性，你看见了她。你知道她十分*古老*，她死去的时间或许比无机生命的存在更久。她侧躺着，倒在铸铁的王座上，四周散落着各种各样的东西：数之不尽的财富、象征权力的文字、保管时光的沙漏…还有一只骨瘦如柴的恶犬趴在地上，等待着自己的主人，但女人似乎长眠不醒。
t_en: You hold your breath and concentrate as you keep going. The melancholy in your mind is personified, and you see a woman with closed eyes. You can tell she is *ancient*, as she probably has been dead even longer than the time non-organic lives have existed. She lies on her side upon a cast iron throne with all sorts of things scattered around her: Untold riches, characters that represent power, an hourglass that manages time... and an emaciated, ferocious hound. The hound rests on the ground, waiting for its owner who seems to be in an eternal slumber.

t_ch: 你知道在那亘古的沉眠之后，发生了很多故事；一切围绕着铸铁的王座开始。你没有什么想法，也未得到解惑，只能继续向前，探寻自己的脚步何时结束。
t_en: You know that many things took place after the slumber, and it all started with the cast iron throne. Without gaining any new insights and having your questions answered, you have no choice but to keep going, wondering when to stop.

t_ch: 嘘…祂来了。「博识尊」的身影由数据电流汇聚而成。你深呼吸，准备接受祂的一瞥——为何世界要走向终结？为什么宇宙会爆发战争？你脑海内充满了困惑。为什么所有的生命都要走向死亡？你也会死去吗？…有人逃得掉吗？
t_en: Shh... Here THEY are. Nous's figure takes form as data currents converge. You take a deep breath to ready yourself for THEIR gaze. Why is the world coming to an end? Why are wars happening everywhere in the universe? Your mind is full of doubts. Why does death happen to all life? Will I die too? ...Can anyone escape this fate?

t_ch: ——你看向了祂，你的心中充满疑问。
t_en: — You look at him as your mind overflows with questions.

t_ch: 接着，一切突如其来——祂的一瞥投向了你。你的「认知」再度拓宽。你可以向祂发问；祂计算、解惑，但祂会以何种语言回答？无从得知。
t_en: Then, everything happens in a flash — THEY turn THEIR gaze toward you. Your perception is widened again, and you can ask THEM questions. THEY can calculate and give you answers, but it is uncertain what kind of language THEY will use.

t_ch: 向祂发问。
t_en: Ask THEM questions.

t_ch: 不向祂发问。
t_en: Do not ask THEM questions.

t_ch: 「阿基维利。」
t_en: "Akivili."

t_ch: 祂不再言语，这便是答案的所有。或许你问出了口；或许没有。一切已然发生了。
t_en: THEY utter a word no more, and that is all there is to answer. You might have asked THEM something, or you might not. Everything has already happened.

t_ch: 在*铸铁的王座*易主之后，「均衡」发生了一丝倾斜。*黄金*、*泥砖*、*血液*、*能源*、*科学*、*启蒙*、*愚昧*，皆化作涓涓细流，在这倾斜中流溢——一些人因此失去存在；一些人因此拥抱虚无。
t_en: After the *cast iron throne* changed hands, the Equilibrium tilted slightly. *Gold*, *bricks*, *blood*, *energy*, *science*, *enlightenment*, and *ignorance* flowed in trickling streams from the Equilibrium. As a result, some lost their existences, and some embraced the Nihility.

t_ch: 然后你抬起头，钟声敲响了。天色阴沉，星空蒙上一层血色。群鸟在枯萎的花与树海间逃散，果实在地上腐烂，「博识尊」计算中的第三个时刻到来了。
t_en: You look up and hear the chimes. The sky is overcast and shrouded in a blood-like layer. Flocks of birds flee among the withered flowers and trees, and fruits are left rotten on the ground. The third moment calculated by Nous has come.

t_ch: 你又看到了那张面庞——等等，你在哪里见过她？天才俱乐部#4…「寂静领主」的名字钻入你的脑海，那是波尔卡•卡卡目向「博识尊」发问的一刹——她糖果色的裙摆拂过整片宇宙。
t_en: Once again, that familiar face is in sight. Hold on. Where have you seen her before? The 4th member of the Genius Society... The name of Lord of Silence comes to mind, and you see Polka Kakamond raising a question to Nous — her pastel-colored skirt sweeps across the entire universe.

t_ch: 在第十七下钟声停止时，#27鲁珀特死于#4波尔卡•卡卡目之手——这是两位天才的相遇，她结束了它的旅途，还有它带来的寰宇战争。
t_en: When the <unbreak>17</unbreak>th chime stops, #27 Rubert is killed by #4 Polka Kakamond. It is an encounter between two geniuses. She has ended its journey as well as the universe-wide war it brings about.

t_ch: 帝皇鲁珀特•其二
t_en: Rubert the Emperor (II)

t_ch: 祂的光辉如冰冷的射线，贯穿你的身躯，并且毫无征兆。祂的眼睛凝视茫茫宇宙，你无法触及任何一条在祂数算之中的根系——祂向你宣判：这是第三个时刻，#27鲁珀特死了。
t_en: THEIR radiance pierces through your body like icy beams without warning. As THEY gaze into the vast universe, you find yourself unable to touch any of the roots within THEIR calculations. A verdict is given: This is the third moment, and #27 Rubert is dead.

t_ch: …祂向鲁珀特投下瞥视的那一日，便已计算到这步吗？
t_en: ...Did THEY already foresee this on the day he gazed at Rubert?

t_ch: 有任何避免的机会吗？
t_en: Is it possible to stop it from happening?

t_ch: 没有。
t_en: No.

t_ch: 倏忽间，祂到来——祂意欲将「时刻」的概念分解，七彩的光辉像跃动的星屑，切割你的感官——可你知道，一切已然确定：这是祂的第三个时刻，#27鲁珀特死了。
t_en: All of a sudden, THEY arrive, intending to shatter the concept of "Instants." The iridescent radiance is gnawing at your senses like dancing stardust, but you understand that everything is certain — this is THEIR third "Instant," and #27 Rubert is dead.

t_ch: 有任何避免的机会吗？
t_en: Is it possible to stop it from happening?

t_ch: 没有。
t_en: No.

t_ch: 接着，你感受到祂——祂古老的*威严*拨乱反正，不多不少、不偏不倚——只影响了一点点手术刀刺入机械胸膛的*角度*——你很清楚：这是祂的第三个时刻，#27鲁珀特死了。
t_en: Next, you sense THEIR presence. With THEIR ancient dominance, THEY make things right with utmost precision and no deviation, only slightly affecting the angle at which the robot's chest is incised with a scalpel. You understand that this is THEIR third moment, and #27 Rubert is dead.

t_ch: 有任何避免的机会吗？
t_en: Is it possible to stop it from happening?

t_ch: 没有。
t_en: No.

t_ch: 它——帝皇鲁珀特。你抬头仰望它…庞然巨物，你只在它的脚踝附近，但悲伤的、刺骨的寒气让你无法靠近。在冷冽的雾霭中，金属绽放着战火也无从掩盖的光辉。你与它对视——
t_en: Here it is, Rubert the emperor. You look up at the gargantuan figure, whose ankle is nearby. Yet, its melancholic and biting cold aura prevents you from coming any closer. Amid the frigid mist, the metal emits a glow that cannot be obscured even by war. You look into its eyes...

t_ch: 顷刻间，你看世间一切作鸟兽散。看它苏醒、沉睡、复苏、又轰然倒塌，一切有如命运轮转，滚滚而去，不可追回，当最后一粒烟尘飘落在地时，第三个时刻结束了。
t_en: In an instant, you see everything in the world dissipate. The world awakens, sleeps, revives, and then collapses. Everything occurs as if fated and cannot be reversed. When the last speckle of dust falls on the ground, it signals the end of the third moment.

t_ch: 阮•梅没有言语，但你从她的眸弯中感受到了某种扑朔的享受…她在享受这种微微的*兴奋*。
t_en: Ruan Mei is silent, but you can discern a mysterious hint of delight in her eyes... She is relishing this faint sense of *excitement*.

t_ch: 「有些数据的运转走到了尽头。」她说，「万物不过微粒，在聚拢后消散。只有宇宙永远古老。」
t_en: "Some data has stopped running," she says. "Everything is nothing but particles that congregate and then dissipate. Only the universe can remain ancient forever."

t_ch: 「而祂们永恒凝视。」螺丝咕姆说。
t_en: "And THEIR gazes are timeless," Screwllum remarks.

t_ch: 终局
t_en: Finale

t_ch: 「好吧，例行总结。」黑塔已经把想法写在了脸上，「斯蒂芬，你来。」
t_en: "Let's sum it up, as usual." It is obvious what Herta intends to say next. "Stephen, let's hear your thoughts."

t_ch: 「我？」斯蒂芬•劳艾德开始吞吞吐吐，「呃…我不敢…」
t_en: "Me?" Stephen Lloyd stammers, "Um... I can't do it..."

t_ch: 「身为一名天才，斯蒂芬•劳艾德竟然不敢面对公众演讲！」黑塔的眼神中明显带有不悦，「总有一天，我们得帮斯蒂芬摆脱这种丢人的群体恐惧。好吧，{NICKNAME}。我们得把和公司有关的部分整理出来，打发下星际和平公司。然后把我们要的，关于星神的数据存储下来。」
t_en: "You're a genius, Stephen Lloyd. I can't believe you can't do public speaking!" Herta's gaze is clearly tinged with annoyance. "One day, we'll help Stephen overcome his fear of crowds. {NICKNAME}, we need to organize the parts related to IPC to keep them happy. Then, we can keep the data about the Aeons that we want."

t_ch: 开始吧。
t_en: Let's begin.

t_ch: 「走。」黑塔漫不经心地转了个圈，「开始了。」
t_en: "Now." Herta casually spins in a circle. "Let's start."

t_ch: 「起点：公司。」螺丝咕姆扭着眼镜上的齿轮，「这是我们能追溯到的最早的历史。」
t_en: "The starting point is IPC." Screwllum twists the gear on his glasses. "It is the earliest point in history we can trace matters back to."

t_ch: 「寰宇蝗灾后是星际和平公司迅速扩张的年代，经历支援队重组、信用体系建立、联觉信标发明等历史时刻，公司一度发展至鼎盛。」
t_en: "The era that came after the Swarm Disaster was when IPC underwent rapid expansion. Historical moments like the support team reorganization, credit system establishment, and Synesthesia Beacon invention took place during this time. The development of IPC reached its peak."

t_ch: 「但公司运作也加剧了星际贫富分化，矛盾日积月累，直到两位高层特劳拉•法恩莎与柯拉帕乌引爆了『边星贸易战争』。这是博识尊计算中的第一个时刻。」
t_en: "Nevertheless, the operation of IPC exacerbated the economic inequality in the universe. Conflicts built up over time, leading to the outbreak of the Borderstar Trade War by two IPC executives, Telora Farnsha and Korapao. That is the first moment calculated by Nous."

t_ch: 祂的身躯再次浮现，但唯有静默。
t_en: Their figure emerges again, but THEY remain in silence.

t_ch: 「公司董事换了一届又一届，历史上的部门、主管更是没人在意。」黑塔补充道，「重要的是博识尊，和祂接下来的计算。」
t_en: "The board of directors of IPC changed from time to time. No one cared about the departments and their heads." Herta adds, "What matters is Nous and THEIR subsequent calculations."

t_ch: 「然后是机器人鲁珀特的诞生。它在日后成为了天才俱乐部#27……」斯蒂芬•劳艾德不安地抠了抠脸颊，「鲁珀特创造了『反有机方程』，边星贸易战争尚未平息，它就为宇宙带来了第二场战争。这是…第二个时刻。」
t_en: "What happened next was the birth of Rubert the robot, which then became the <unbreak>27</unbreak>th member of the Genius Society..." Stephen Lloyd scratches his face uneasily and continues. "Rubert came up with the Anti-Organic Equation and instigated the second war while the Borderstar Trade War was still ongoing. That is... the second moment."

t_ch: 「『帝皇』鲁珀特，它认为有机生命的演算充满错谬、漏洞百出。无论能够繁荣几时，总是自发地使生命走向终结——这或许是它推导反有机方程的起点。」螺丝咕姆说，「推测：它因『反有机方程』被博识尊注视。」
t_en: "Rubert the emperor believed that the algorithm of organic lives was riddled with errors and loopholes. No matter how long their prosperous lives continued, they would inevitably bring their lives to an end — this was probably what inspired Rubert to derive the Anti-Organic Equation. My conjecture: Rubert received Nous's gaze for his Anti-Organic Equation," Screwllum comments.

t_ch: 「鲁珀特本是台被丢在垃圾堆里的计算机，却奇迹般地产生了自我意识。」黑塔突然打了个喷嚏，「它曾一度陷入沉睡，又再次醒来——『帝皇战争』和『边星贸易战争』同时爆发、延续，成了不亚于寰宇蝗灾的惨剧。」
t_en: "Rubert used to be a discarded computer. It was a miracle that it developed awareness." Herta sneezes suddenly. "It was once in a slumber but managed to wake up... The simultaneous outbreak and continuation of the Emperor's War and Borderstar Trade War was almost as tragic as the Swarm Disaster."

t_ch: 「最后…是第三个时刻。」
t_en: "Last but not least... the third moment."

t_ch: 「噢！是我最喜欢的环节！」黑塔突然兴奋，她踮了踮脚尖，「寂静领主！你干得不错，我是说，十分出色——我想见你！你能听到吗？」
t_en: "Oh! It's my favorite!" Herta suddenly stood on her tiptoes in excitement. "Lord of Silence, you did well! I mean, you were exceptional! I'd like to meet you! Can you hear me?"

t_ch: 「#27『帝皇』鲁珀特被#4『寂静领主』杀死了。」阮•梅依旧用她平静的声音总结着，她的言语化作数据储存进模拟宇宙的系统中，「祂的计算里没有#27的名字，也没有#4；祂只说了结果：在那一秒，帝皇的生命与它的帝国同时结束。」
t_en: "#27, Rubert the Emperor, was killed by #4, the Lord of Silence," Ruan Mei summarizes in her ever-peaceful voice. Her words transform into data that is stored in the Simulated Universe system. "#27's name is not found in THEIR calculations, nor is the name of #4. THEY only state the outcome: At that moment, the emperor and its empire ceased to exist at the same time."

t_ch: 「也有人说这事背后是公司在推，但现在看来——至少波尔卡在现场。要是能问本人就好了。」黑塔嘟囔着，「那么，其它『星神』的痕迹呢？」
t_en: "Some opined that IPC was behind this. Looking at it now, at least we can be certain that Polka was there. If only I could ask her in person..." Herta mutters. "How about the traces of other Aeons?"

t_ch: 「『迷思』…我看到了祂的痕迹。」阮•梅思忖道。
t_en: "Mythus... I saw THEIR trace," Ruan Mei says contemplatively.

t_ch: 「呃…『阿哈』的笑声。」斯蒂芬•劳艾德有点犹豫，「但可能是假的，祂什么都做得出来。」
t_en: "Um... And Aha's laughter." Stephen Lloyd says hesitantly, "It could be bogus, since THEY were unscrupulous."

t_ch: 「『互』的光辉也被模拟宇宙捕捉到了。」阮•梅接着说，「战火越烧越旺，祂不会坐视不管。但无论如何，博识尊计算中的『时刻』一一应验，仿佛没有任何力量出手撼动；或许有哪位星神尝试过，或许从来没有。」
t_en: "The radiance of HooH was also captured by the Simulated Universe," Ruan Mei continues. "THEY would not stand by and do nothing as the war raged on. However, the moments calculated by Nous did come true one after another as though no forces had interfered with them. Perhaps, some Aeons did or did not attempt to do so."

t_ch: 「有没有可能，模拟宇宙终究出自天才之手，无法阻止祂的并非模拟星神，而是我们的智慧？」黑塔摊手，「熟悉的祂——我怀念被祂瞥视的那天，我怀念向祂求知的心情。时间流逝，而祂亘古不变，多有趣…好了，我们是不是该出去了？」
t_en: "The Simulated Universe is, after all, created by geniuses. Is it possible that what failed to prevent the moments from happening was our limited intelligence, not the simulated Aeons?" Herta shrugs. "The familiar Aeon... I miss the day THEY gazed at me and how I felt when I asked THEM questions. The passage of time never changes THEM. How interesting... Well, is it time for us to get out?"

t_ch: 「提问：仍有一事不解。」螺丝咕姆说，「此时空是否存在<color=#dbc291ff>鲁珀特二世</color>的痕迹？」
t_en: "Question: There's something I still don't understand," Screwllum says. "Are there traces of <color=#dbc291ff>Rubert II</color> in this dimension?"

t_ch: 「不可能。」阮•梅斟酌着，但她露出了犹豫的神情。思忖片刻，她放弃了推论，「我知道你关心他，但<color=#dbc291ff>鲁珀特二世</color>不可能出现在如此古老的时空中。」
t_en: "No way." Ruan Mei ruminates the question with a look of hesitation. After a moment of contemplation, she gives up speculating. "I know you care about him, but it's impossible for <color=#dbc291ff>Rubert II</color> to exist in such an ancient dimension."

t_ch: 「呃…等有机会再说吧。」黑塔摊手，「我想，这些东西够应付公司了。等下次，我们可以再尝试更纯粹的模拟。」
t_en: "Um... We can discuss it again when we have the chance." Herta shrugs and says, "I think we've got enough to send to IPC. Let's try a more straightforward simulation next time."

t_ch: 开端•星际和平公司
t_en: Beginning: Interastral Peace Corporation

t_ch: 你审视陌生的四周…星际和平公司招聘专员微笑着站在你面前，你意识到这是你该做出*选择*的时刻。
t_en: You check out the unfamiliar surroundings... An IPC recruiter stands in front of you with a smile. You realize it is time for you to make a *decision*.

t_ch: 「欢迎你，新晋的公司职员——你定是一位充满*血性*的有机生命！让我为你介绍公司体系。」
t_en: "Welcome aboard, newcomer! You must be a spirited organic lifeform! Let me explain the company's structure to you."

t_ch: 「第一个选择：追随『政宣部』<color=#dbc291ff>特劳拉•法恩莎</color>，她被称为『教母』，她的势力十分古老。」特聘专员认真介绍着，「她身后追随着四大『<color=#dbc291ff>护卫队</color>』。他们掌握着古老的『精神调控』。法恩莎擅长激励和演说，她帮助公司在各个星球扩张。据说法恩莎的『护卫队』策划过<unbreak>200</unbreak>多次谋杀，但她一生中只亲手杀过一个人。」
t_en: "Your first choice: Follow <color=#dbc291ff>Telora Farnsha</color> from the Outreach and Engagement Division. She is known as the "Godmother" and her faction is ancient." The recruiter points out in a serious tone. "The four major <color=#dbc291ff>Guardians</color> follow behind her. They are versed the ancient skill of Psychological Manipulation. Farnsha, who excels in giving motivational speeches, helps the IPC to expand across the planets. It is said that Farnsha's Guardians have orchestrated over <unbreak>200</unbreak> murders, but she has only personally killed someone once in her life."

t_ch: 「第二个选择：追随『装卸部』<color=#dbc291ff>柯拉帕乌</color>。他们是新生的集团，如同所有的新生代那样：狂妄、热情、年轻气盛。他身后追随着不同星球的『<color=#dbc291ff>合伙人</color>』，把持宇宙资源的运输、物流。」
t_en: "Your second choice: Follow <color=#dbc291ff>Korapao</color> from the Cargo Division. It is a newly established division. Like all the youths, they are cocky, enthusiastic, and full of vim and vigor. Korapao has the support of the <color=#dbc291ff>Associates</color> across the planets and is in charge of the logistics of resources in the universe."

t_ch: 「嗯。第三个选择：『技术部』<color=#dbc291ff>德•维恩</color>。那些渴望打破规则、野心勃勃的人才会选择追随他！他们擅长古语、编程、破译新语言，也被称作『机密破解部』。他们有自己的外部雇佣兵团队——他们的技术能力很强，可惜，其他部门的人总把他们称为『<color=#dbc291ff>野路子</color>』。」
t_en: "And your third choice: Follow <color=#dbc291ff>De Wayne</color> from the Technology Division. Only those who are eager to break the rules and ambitious will follow him! As they are good at ancient languages, coding, and deciphering new languages, the division is also known as the Decryption Division. They have an external mercenary squad at their disposal, and their technical capabilities are exceptional. Yet, the other divisions still call them the <color=#dbc291ff>Mavericks</color>."

t_ch: 『政宣部』特劳拉•法恩莎。
t_en: Telora Farnsha from the Outreach and Engagement Division.

t_ch: 「仪器已记住了你的选择。」星际和平公司特聘专员向你鞠了一躬，「期待你的自我认知发展，旅途愉快。」
t_en: "Your choice has been recorded in the device." The IPC recruiter bows at you. "I look forward to seeing the development of your Intra-Cognition. Have a great trip."

t_ch: 『装卸部』柯拉帕乌。
t_en: Korapao from the Cargo Division.

t_ch: 「仪器已记住了你的选择。」星际和平公司特聘专员向你鞠了一躬，「期待你的自我认知发展，旅途愉快。」
t_en: "Your choice has been recorded in the device." The IPC recruiter bows at you. "I look forward to seeing the development of your Intra-Cognition. Have a great trip."

t_ch: 『技术部』德•维恩。
t_en: De Wayne from the Technology Division.

t_ch: 「仪器已记住了你的选择。」星际和平公司特聘专员向你鞠了一躬，「期待你的自我认知发展，旅途愉快。」
t_en: "Your choice has been recorded in the device." The IPC recruiter bows at you. "I look forward to seeing the development of your Intra-Cognition. Have a great trip."

t_ch: 判定有机：「合伙人」•其一
t_en: Judged as Organic: Associates (I)

t_ch: 寰宇蝗灾后，公司经历重组，内部势力涌动，各自寻求新的发展方向。「装卸部」柯拉帕乌找到博识学会。此刻，你们正一同坐在会议室内商讨事宜。
t_en: Following the Swarm Disaster, the IPC underwent a reorganization. Internal forces actively sought new paths of development. Korapao from the Cargo Division visited the Intelligentsia Guild. As of now, you are in the middle of a discussion with him in a conference room.

t_ch: 你审视着古「装卸部」的「合伙人」团队，他们从宇宙边境的废土厮杀而来，一看就是*狠角色*——他们带领着各自的手下为柯拉帕乌卖命。
t_en: You observe the Associates of the ancient Cargo Division. Judging from the fact that they fought their way here from the barren land on the borders of the universe, you know they are not to be trifled with. They serve Korapao with great dedication along with their subordinates.

t_ch: 一位矮小的「合伙人」递来情报，执行董事在上次与柯拉帕乌交涉过后，终止了和流光忆庭的合作，「政宣部」特劳拉•法恩莎扶持的忆泡技术让步于联觉信标。现在，公司内部对特劳拉•法恩莎的地位是否会被撼动议论纷纷。
t_en: According to a short Associate, the executive director of IPC has terminated the collaboration with the Garden of Recollection after their last discussion with Korapao. The Memory Bubble technology that Telora Farnsha of the Outreach and Engagement Division vouches for is forced to give way to the Synesthesia Beacon. Speculation is rife about Farnsha's status in IPC.

t_ch: 你知道，这将是你一生中出人头地的最好机会。无论你原先的信仰是什么，此刻都应该相信*机遇*…你知道，成为柯拉帕乌的合伙人需要通过「吻手礼」。
t_en: It is clear to you it is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to be successful. No matter what faith you previously believed in, this *opportunity* should override it... You know you must go through the hand-kissing ceremony to be Korapao's associate.

t_ch: 亲吻柯拉帕乌的手背。
t_en: Kiss the back of Korapao's hand.

t_ch: 拒绝这个*机会*。
t_en: Turn down this *opportunity*.

t_ch: 年轻的柯拉帕乌获得了理想中的机会，毫无疑问，他会大干一场！他很快为公司带来了计划中的盈利和影响力。此后，公司贸易兴盛，出资在寰宇增设大批测量站点，博识学会得到资金支持，建立了银河图书馆「伊斯梅尔」。
t_en: The young Korapao is given a dream opportunity to succeed, and he undoubtedly makes full use of it! Soon, he rakes in the profits and influences for IPC as planned. IPC, with thriving trades, finances the construction of many measurement stations in the universe and provides funds for the Intelligentsia Guild to build Izmael, the cosmic library.

t_ch: 数年后，你得知特劳拉•法恩莎的势力从「政宣部」分出，独自成立「贸易部」，特劳拉•法恩莎晋升P<unbreak>-48</unbreak>。
t_en: Years later, you learn that Telora Farnsha's forces has separated from the Outreach and Engagement Division, forming the Trade Division, as she is promoted to P<unbreak>-48</unbreak>.

t_ch: 双赢的局面不禁令人怀疑这背后是否另有隐情，但碍于大人物的权威，包括你在内，现场没有一个人敢提出质疑。
t_en: The win-win situation seems dubious, but no one — including you — dares to raise any questions against the authority.

t_ch: 特劳拉•法恩莎与柯拉帕乌在此后共同控制、周转众多星系的资源。这场空前绝后的大垄断，也成了「边星贸易战争」的开端。
t_en: Telora Farnsha and Korapao have since jointly controlled and managed the resources of many galaxies. This unprecedented monopoly marks the beginning of the Borderstar Trade War.

t_ch: 认知拓宽：「合伙人」•其二
t_en: Broadened Cognition: Associates (II)

t_ch: 你眼睁睁看着漫天香料在面前散开，一些辛辣的味道钻进你的鼻腔。你知道这一切的开端…恐怖的无机生命，它们如同*战争机器*在烟尘中穿梭！它们的钻头可以轻易贯穿你！
t_en: You watch in horror as a myriad of spices scatter before you, and some spicy scents infiltrate your nostrils. You know the beginning of all this... the terrifying inorganic life, like *war machines* darting through the smoke and dust! Their drill heads can easily penetrate you!

t_ch: 躲避。
t_en: Avoid them.

t_ch: 是的，这中间经历了很多，才演变为如今的局面：「博识学会」的<color=#dbc291ff>可瑞希特拉博士</color>，曾为「装卸部」柯拉帕乌制造超距运输船只，帮助他在边星战中躲过各种危机的人——却在帝皇战争中遭到背叛：背叛来自柯拉帕乌的<color=#dbc291ff>合伙人-叄号</color>，但博士认定其中有柯拉帕乌的授意。
t_en: Indeed, the current situation is the result of a series of events: <color=#dbc291ff>Prof. Cressitra</color> from the Intelligentsia Guild once built a long-distance vessel for Korapao of the Cargo Division to keep Korapao safe during the Borderstar Trade War, only to face betrayal in the Emperor's War by Korapao's <color=#dbc291ff>Associate No. 3</color>'s hands. Prof. Cressitra firmly believed that Korapao knew and approved of the deed.

t_ch: 可瑞希特拉博士在愤怒和绝望中选择了炸毁超距运输船只，造成了法恩莎麾下惑神星最严重的「香料磨难」事故：柯拉帕乌被迫与法恩莎阵营解绑，从此在帝皇战争中陷入孤立无援。
t_en: Driven by rage and desperation, Prof. Cressitra decided to blow up the long-distance vessel, resulting in the gravest Spice Ordeal incident ever happening on the Planet Temptra at Farnsha's helm. In consequence, Korapao was forced to sever ties with Farnsha's faction and deprive himself of support in the Emperor's War.
